hk_001.title: Massive Influx of Souls
hk_001.body: A war has just ravaged a mortal kingdom. Thousands of souls are arriving at the gates of your domain.

choices.A: Open the gates wide, we take everything.
choices.B: Filter severely, only the most useful enter.
choices.C: Send a portion back to Earth, let the chaos continue.

hk_002.title: Whims of Demonic Generals
hk_002.body: Your generals are demanding more power and the right to launch their own campaigns of terror.

choices.A: Grant them legions, even if you lose some control.
choices.B: Tighten the leash, everything must go through you.
choices.C: Let them have fun on Earth under surveillance.

hk_003.title: Influence on the Living World
hk_003.body: An infernal sect wants to spread your cult on the surface. Some demons fear this will attract attention.

choices.A: Encourage the cult, power comes first.
choices.B: Limit rituals to isolated places.
choices.C: Dissolve the sect before it becomes uncontrollable.

hk_004.title: Traffic Jam at the Gates of Hell
hk_004.body: The queue of new damned souls stretches for miles. Complaints are piling up, as is the paperwork.

choices.A: Speed up the sorting, even if it means being less precise.
choices.B: Reinforce procedures, order above all.
choices.C: Delegate the sorting to an ambitious demon.

hk_005.title: Overwhelmed Infernal Court
hk_005.body: The infernal judges complain they can no longer keep up. Souls have been waiting for their sentence for centuries.

choices.A: Impose daily judgment quotas.
choices.B: Recruit new judges from among the damned.
choices.C: Postpone minor cases, prioritize major criminals.

hk_006.title: Revolt in a Torture Circle
hk_006.body: In one circle, the damned have managed to disarm a few guards and turn the instruments against them.

choices.A: Crush the revolt with extra legions.
choices.B: Negotiate a 'reduction' in punishments in exchange for calm.
choices.C: Make a public example to terrorize the other circles.

hk_007.title: Attempted Demonic Coup
hk_007.body: A demonic prince is quietly gathering troops and whispering that he would be a better King of Hell.

choices.A: Let him believe he has your blessing, then strike.
choices.B: Invite him officially, give him a highly monitored role.
choices.C: Ignore the rumor, your legions are enough to deter.

hk_008.title: Contract with a Mortal King
hk_008.body: A human king wants to sign a pact: in exchange for your help, he promises his soul and that of his lineage.

choices.A: Accept and strengthen your influence on Earth.
choices.B: Moderate the pact, fewer souls but more durable.
choices.C: Refuse, this kind of pact attracts too much attention from above.

hk_009.title: Inspection by an Archangel
hk_009.body: An archangel descends to observe the state of your kingdom. He claims he wants to verify that 'the balance' is respected.

choices.A: Mask the chaos and show a disciplined Hell.
choices.B: Proudly display the excesses, it is your kingdom.
choices.C: Guide him to an area specially decorated for him.

hk_010.title: Soul Leak to the Surface
hk_010.body: A crack in an ancient portal is allowing a few damned souls to go back up and haunt the living.

choices.A: Let them sow fear, you will collect more later.
choices.B: Seal the portal, every soul must stay in its place.
choices.C: Transform the crack into a controlled passage.

hk_011.title: Torturers' Strike
hk_011.body: The torturers are demanding better conditions: stronger chains, more stable flames, clear schedules.

choices.A: Give in to a few demands to avoid a blockage.
choices.B: Repress the strike, no one negotiates with you.
choices.C: Replace the torturers with zealous damned souls.

hk_012.title: Black Market of Promises
hk_012.body: A clandestine market is selling and trading promises of damnation between demons and mortals.

choices.A: Legalize and tax this market.
choices.B: Destroy it, contracts must remain under your control.
choices.C: Let it exist as long as it remains discreet.

hk_013.title: Artifact from the Depths
hk_013.body: An artifact so ancient has been found that even you do not know its origin. It pulses with disturbing energy.

choices.A: Keep it near your throne, under surveillance.
choices.B: Bury it even deeper.
choices.C: Send it into the world of the living to divert attention.

hk_014.title: Rumor of Redemption
hk_014.body: A rumor is circulating: some souls could purify themselves even here. Your advisors are divided.

choices.A: Stifle the rumor, Hell is not a spa.
choices.B: Create a special zone to test this 'redemption'.
choices.C: Let it run, if some calm down it will be easier to manage.

hk_015.title: Macabre Games Between Demons
hk_015.body: Demons are organizing games where they bet souls, legions, and territory on the surface.

choices.A: Forbid these games, too dangerous.
choices.B: Regulate them, with you as the supreme referee.
choices.C: Participate anonymously, to influence the results.

hk_016.title: Festival of Torments
hk_016.body: The demons are demanding a grand festival to celebrate your millennia of reign.

choices.A: Organize a grandiose spectacle, let all of Hell remember it.
choices.B: Hold a somber ceremony, order comes first.
choices.C: Move the festival to areas close to the surface.

hk_017.title: Mad Prophet on Earth
hk_017.body: A mortal claims to speak in your name. His speeches attract a crowd of faithful... and enemies.

choices.A: Reinforce his visions, let him inflame the crowds.
choices.B: Temper his words, he is already dangerous enough.
choices.C: Let him sink into madness without intervening.

hk_018.title: Offer of Celestial Truce
hk_018.body: A celestial messenger proposes a temporary truce: fewer interventions on the surface, in exchange for more cosmic stability.

choices.A: Accept, cosmic order benefits you too.
choices.B: Refuse, Hell does not let its conduct be dictated.
choices.C: Officially accept but discreetly violate the truce.

hk_019.title: Ash Storm
hk_019.body: An ash storm engulfs several circles. Visibility drops, the damned panic.

choices.A: Let the storm run its course, it's the normal landscape.
choices.B: Send legions to restore a semblance of order.
choices.C: Take advantage of the chaos to redistribute souls where you want.

hk_020.title: New Experimental Circle
hk_020.body: One of your architects proposes a new type of circle, more efficient but unstable.

choices.A: Validate the project and open it immediately.
choices.B: Test it on a small number of souls first.
choices.C: Refuse, the current balance is already fragile enough.

hk_021.title: Riot of the Philosopher Damned
hk_021.body: Some damned souls are debating the meaning of eternal punishment and challenging your legitimacy.

choices.A: Silence them, by any means necessary.
choices.B: Create a circle dedicated to their debates, well isolated.
choices.C: Send them to preach on Earth to confuse beliefs.

hk_022.title: Overzealous Accountant Demon
hk_022.body: A demon in charge of the soul registries reports inconsistencies and wants to recalculate everything.

choices.A: Let him verify everything, order will be strengthened.
choices.B: Ignore him, no one will ever read all those registries.
choices.C: Use his zeal to track down strategic souls.

hk_023.title: Legion Commanders' Tournament
hk_023.body: Legion commanders want to organize a tournament to prove who deserves more troops.

choices.A: Authorize the tournament, with you as the final judge.
choices.B: Refuse, legions must obey, not entertain themselves.
choices.C: Authorize, but rig the results to your advantage.

hk_024.title: Soul of a Legendary Hero
hk_024.body: The soul of a hero highly respected by mortals finally descends into your kingdom.

choices.A: Display him as a trophy to inspire fear.
choices.B: Use him as an advisor, he knows humans well.
choices.C: Send him back briefly to Earth as a cursed champion.

hk_025.title: Strange Song in the Depths
hk_025.body: A song from the deep resonates. Even the oldest demons are uneasy.

choices.A: Investigate personally, surrounded by your guards.
choices.B: Seal the area and declare access forbidden.
choices.C: Let the song spread, see who answers it.

hk_026.title: Offer from a Forgotten Cult
hk_026.body: An ancient cult, almost extinct, wants to return in exchange for a few infernal 'favors'.

choices.A: Accept, even a weak cult remains useful.
choices.B: Refuse, these relics of the past complicate everything.
choices.C: Absorb the cult and completely change its face.

hk_027.title: Contest for the Worst Torment
hk_027.body: The torturers are launching a contest to invent the most creative torment.

choices.A: Encourage it, creativity is good for demonic morale.
choices.B: Limit the damage, some attempts go too far.
choices.C: Reserve this contest for a very, very isolated circle.

hk_028.title: Council of Ancient Demons
hk_028.body: The oldest demons ask for an audience to speak about the future of Hell.

choices.A: Listen to them and integrate some of their ideas.
choices.B: Thank them politely then continue as before.
choices.C: Divide them by giving them conflicting privileges.

hk_029.title: Embassy from Neighboring Hells
hk_029.body: Another infernal kingdom sends an embassy. Its ruler proposes an alliance: exchange of souls, legions, and territories on the surface.

choices.A: Sign an aggressive pact, focused on harvesting souls.
choices.B: Negotiate a strictly framed agreement, to keep control.
choices.C: Emphasize influence on Earth, even if it upsets your troops.

hk_030.title: Forge of Cursed Weapons
hk_030.body: A demonic forge invents a new type of weapon that makes legions almost unstoppable, but unstable.

choices.A: Massively arm your legions with these weapons.
choices.B: Reserve these weapons for a few elite units.
choices.C: Limit their production, priority to discipline.

hk_031.title: Unauthorized Portals
hk_031.body: Demons have opened portals to the surface without asking you. Energy leaks are attracting attention from the worlds above.

choices.A: Expand these portals, the opportunity is too good.
choices.B: Close them properly, imposing strict rules.
choices.C: Keep only a few in discreet areas.

hk_032.title: Duels Between Champions
hk_032.body: Your best champions, souls and demons alike, are constantly fighting to catch your eye and demand more power.

choices.A: Favor the most brutal demons.
choices.B: Reward the most cunning souls.
choices.C: Establish a code of honor to regulate the duels.

hk_033.title: Infernal City on Earth
hk_033.body: A district in a major mortal city looks more and more like an annex of Hell: cults, violence, symbols carved everywhere.

choices.A: Transform it into a true infernal bastion.
choices.B: Recover mostly precious souls, discreetly.
choices.C: Arm a few legions to control this urban chaos.

hk_034.title: Lottery of the Damned
hk_034.body: A demon has invented a lottery where the damned can 'win' a lighter torment in exchange for denunciations and services.

choices.A: Encourage this system, it attracts many souls.
choices.B: Transform it into a strict control tool.
choices.C: Entrust it to your legions so they can profit from it.

hk_035.title: Tower of Confessions
hk_035.body: An immense tower where the damned come to confess what they never said while alive. These secrets could be useful to you.

choices.A: Use these confessions to reinforce your stock of souls.
choices.B: Exploit certain secrets to influence the surface.
choices.C: File these archives to improve infernal order.

hk_036.title: War of Torture Styles
hk_036.body: Two schools of torture oppose each other: one advocates refinement, the other pure brutality. The quarrels are escalating.

choices.A: Support the brutal school, useful for your legions.
choices.B: Support the refined school, more compatible with order.
choices.C: Let them compete, you feed on both sides.

hk_037.title: Nightmare Export
hk_037.body: A department proposes to systematize sending nightmares to mortals to prepare their souls to join you.

choices.A: Flood their nights with infernal visions.
choices.B: Target mostly human leaders and rulers.
choices.C: Calibrate the nightmares to maintain balance.

hk_038.title: Revolt of the Infernal Scribes
hk_038.body: The scribes who record every sin, every contract, and every torment complain of being ignored despite their importance.

choices.A: Reward them with more military power.
choices.B: Integrate them further into the chain of command.
choices.C: Flatter them in public, without making too many concessions.

hk_039.title: Collapsed Temple on the Surface
hk_039.body: An ancient temple dedicated to your cult has just collapsed. Some mortals see it as a sign, others just a ruin.

choices.A: Reinforce the discreet presence of your agents in the area.
choices.B: Take advantage of the event to attract new souls.
choices.C: Transform the place into a more structured anchor point.

hk_040.title: Infernal Strategic Council
hk_040.body: Your most influential advisors are meeting. Everyone wants you to prioritize their domain: souls, armies, order, or the surface.

choices.A: Give a little more to everyone, at the risk of straining order.
choices.B: Impose the primacy of order, even if it means losing souls.
choices.C: Invest in the surface, your future playground.

hk_041.title: Deadly Sins Expo
hk_041.body: You are proposed to organize a grand 'expo' where each deadly sin would have its pavilion, attractions, and demonic ambassadors.

choices.A: Focus on the lure of souls, at all costs.
choices.B: Structure the event like a highly regulated fair.
choices.C: Make it mainly a showcase for your elite troops.

hk_042.title: Infernal Military Academy
hk_042.body: Your generals want to create an official academy to train future legion commanders.

choices.A: Focus on brute force and fear.
choices.B: Value loyalty and discipline above all.
choices.C: Include courses on surface manipulation.

hk_043.title: Great Infernal Eclipse
hk_043.body: A rare eclipse darkens both Hell and the surface. The boundaries between worlds become thinner.

choices.A: Take the opportunity to push more souls towards you.
choices.B: Reinforce the barriers to avoid leaks.
choices.C: Let your demons infiltrate the dreams of mortals.

hk_044.title: Drafting a New Infernal Code
hk_044.body: Your jurists wish to completely rewrite the Code of Punishments to adapt it to modern vices.

choices.A: Create a more ruthless Code for souls.
choices.B: Integrate the demands of certain generals into it.
choices.C: Insist on the clarity and efficiency of the rules.

hk_045.title: Conclave of Tempters
hk_045.body: The tempters working on the surface want a more significant voice in the global strategy.

choices.A: Give them more freedom to harvest souls.
choices.B: Integrate them into a stricter hierarchy.
choices.C: Force them to coordinate their actions with the legions.

hk_046.title: Epidemic of Infernal Weariness
hk_046.body: Even some demons seem tired of punishing the same sins for centuries.

choices.A: Replace them with fresher recruits.
choices.B: Organize war campaigns to wake them up.
choices.C: Rearrange certain circles to vary the pleasures.

hk_047.title: Tower of Distorted Screams
hk_047.body: A tower collects and amplifies the screams of the damned. Recently, the echoes have started disturbing even your soldiers.

choices.A: Redirect these screams to the surface to haunt it.
choices.B: Isolate the tower in a highly controlled zone.
choices.C: Use these echoes to mentally train your legions.

hk_048.title: Market of Damned Illusions
hk_048.body: A market offers the damned temporary illusions of their past lives in exchange for long additional years of torment.

choices.A: Encourage this market, it fills your reserves quickly.
choices.B: Regulate contracts to keep a minimum of order.
choices.C: Reserve certain illusions for those most useful to your plans.

hk_049.title: Game of Conquest Between Demons
hk_049.body: A strategy game circulating among demons simulates the conquest of new lands on the surface.

choices.A: Make it an official tool for choosing campaigns.
choices.B: Restrict it to the training of a few officers.
choices.C: Let demons play freely, without much supervision.

hk_050.title: Prophecy Carved in Lava
hk_050.body: Inscriptions appearing in the lava announce the fall of a 'King of Flames' if the balance is broken too much.

choices.A: Ignore the prophecy and accelerate damnation further.
choices.B: Reinforce order to avoid a brutal shift.
choices.C: Distribute the chaos between the surface, legions, and souls.

hk_051.title: Tunnel to an Ancient Forgotten Hell
hk_051.body: Demonic miners have broken through to a very ancient zone, abandoned for millennia.

choices.A: Immediately send new souls there to be exploited.
choices.B: Explore it cautiously with a disciplined force.
choices.C: Use it as a secret base for operations on Earth.

hk_052.title: Plot of the Shadow Archivists
hk_052.body: The archivists in charge of recording pacts and sins threaten to reveal the mismanagement of certain generals.

choices.A: Protect your secrets by feeding them souls.
choices.B: Put these archives under strict military control.
choices.C: Let a few scandals leak to rebalance power.

hk_053.title: Spark Storms on the Surface
hk_053.body: Small showers of sparks from below are falling on certain places on the surface, fueling conflicts.

choices.A: Intensify these showers to harvest more souls.
choices.B: Limit their frequency to avoid attracting too much attention.
choices.C: Channel them towards already unstable areas.

hk_054.title: Reform of the Sacred Chains
hk_054.body: You are proposed to replace old infernal chains with subtler bonds, based on promises and regrets.

choices.A: Focus the reform on the quantity of bound souls.
choices.B: Prioritize solidity and control of flows.
choices.C: Test these chains primarily on certain mortal leaders.

hk_055.title: Carnival of Monstrous Illusions
hk_055.body: Troupes of illusionist demons want to organize a permanent carnival in a particular circle.

choices.A: Make it an irresistible soul trap.
choices.B: Integrate it into the general order as an experimental zone.
choices.C: Link it to certain places on the surface on special nights.

hk_056.title: River of Blood Flooding
hk_056.body: One of the great rivers of blood is overflowing and threatening several important facilities.

choices.A: Channel the flood towards overpopulated circles.
choices.B: Erect infernal dikes with your disciplined units.
choices.C: Let the river redraw the infernal landscape.

hk_057.title: Corruption Contest on Earth
hk_057.body: Demons are challenging each other: corrupt increasingly influential public figures.

choices.A: Reward the massive harvest of souls.
choices.B: Demand a more targeted and controlled approach.
choices.C: Value spectacular operations on the surface.

hk_058.title: World Observation Tower
hk_058.body: A tower allows observation of the dreams, wars, and prayers of mortals in real-time.

choices.A: Use these visions to trap even more souls.
choices.B: Use it to precisely adjust your internal order.
choices.C: Grant access to certain hand-picked commanders.

hk_059.title: Cult of the King of Hell
hk_059.body: Some demons are starting to worship you as a deity and demand rituals in your honor.

choices.A: Encourage this cult, at the risk of feeding excess.
choices.B: Structure it within a well-defined hierarchy.
choices.C: Tolerate it on the surface only, as a political instrument.

hk_060.title: Unknown Voice in the Tunnels
hk_060.body: Patrols hear a voice whispering secrets about the flaws of your reign.

choices.A: Send groups of condemned souls to investigate.
choices.B: Mandate disciplined legions to secure the area.
choices.C: Discreetly exploit these whispers to adjust your strategy.

hk_061.title: Laboratory of New Sins
hk_061.body: An experimental circle seeks to invent forms of vice adapted to the modern era.

choices.A: Test these innovations on a maximum number of mortals.
choices.B: Integrate them into a strictly controlled protocol.
choices.C: Broadcast only the most effective ones to the surface.

hk_062.title: Grand Infernal Games
hk_062.body: Macabre games with trials, bets, and challenges pit damned, demons, and sometimes a few hero souls against each other.

choices.A: Orient them towards massive soul collection.
choices.B: Make it a training tool for your legions.
choices.C: Link them to surface events to strengthen your influence.

hk_063.title: Revolt of an Autonomous Circle
hk_063.body: A circle has started administering itself without sending up the usual reports.

choices.A: Drown it under new souls to regain control.
choices.B: Send a disciplined force to restore central authority.
choices.C: Observe first, to see if this model is usable elsewhere.

hk_064.title: Library of Broken Beliefs
hk_064.body: A library gathers the texts, prayers, and betrayed hopes of mortals.

choices.A: Make it a psychological weapon to torture further.
choices.B: Organize it to improve global soul management.
choices.C: Use it to refine operations on the surface.

hk_065.title: Diplomatic Crisis with Another Plane
hk_065.body: A neighboring plane, neither totally celestial nor totally infernal, protests against your incursions.

choices.A: Respond with a brutal show of force.
choices.B: Negotiate borders and precise rules.
choices.C: Divert the conflict towards surface areas.

hk_066.title: Contest for the Most Irredeemable Soul
hk_066.body: Your torturers are fighting over the title of 'worst case' ever handled.

choices.A: Amplify punishments to harvest more energy.
choices.B: Impose a strict framework, even in horror.
choices.C: Use these cases as examples to frighten the surface.

hk_067.title: Festival of Demonic Masks
hk_067.body: A festival where demons and damned wear masks representing their faults and ambitions.

choices.A: Turn this festival into a vast trap for new souls.
choices.B: Structure it as a ritual of order and hierarchy.
choices.C: Symbolically link it to certain surface cults.

hk_068.title: Negotiation with a Forgotten Deity
hk_068.body: A deity almost erased from the mortal world seeks refuge and influence in your domain.

choices.A: Use it to attract a flood of nostalgic souls.
choices.B: Integrate it into your order as a highly monitored vassal.
choices.C: Send it to play a discreet role on the surface.

hk_069.title: Colossus of Ash
hk_069.body: A gigantic colossus of ash has formed in an infernal desert and is attracting the gaze of the entire kingdom.

choices.A: Feed it with souls to turn it into a weapon.
choices.B: Chain it and integrate it into the controlled landscape.
choices.C: Link it to certain places on the surface as a living symbol.

hk_070.title: Assembly of a Thousand Whispers
hk_070.body: Thousands of voices of the damned whisper your name and debate every decision you take.

choices.A: Exploit this chorus to probe the mass of souls.
choices.B: Channel these whispers into a council structure.
choices.C: Let these voices spread to the surface to influence dreamers.

hk_071.title: Congress of Famous Sinners
hk_071.body: Several souls very famous among mortals meet in the same circle and want to be treated like an elite.

choices.A: Display them as trophies to attract more souls.
choices.B: Subject them to the same rules as everyone else.
choices.C: Use them to discreetly influence the surface.

hk_072.title: Military Maneuvers at the Borders
hk_072.body: Your legions are training near the limits of your kingdom, which worries neighboring planes.

choices.A: Turn the exercise into a real show of force.
choices.B: Reassure officially, while maintaining the training.
choices.C: Move part of the troops towards terrestrial targets.

hk_073.title: Circle of Creative Blasphemers
hk_073.body: A circle groups those who invented new forms of blasphemy. Their ideas could be useful or derail everything.

choices.A: Exploit their inventiveness to attract more souls.
choices.B: Isolate them strictly to preserve order.
choices.C: Let some of their ideas filter through to the surface.

hk_074.title: Court of Refined Torments
hk_074.body: A court of torture artisans proposes refined, almost artistic sufferings.

choices.A: Maximize the quantity of souls treated.
choices.B: Establish a rigid protocol for each torment.
choices.C: Reserve these refinements for influential targets on Earth.

hk_075.title: Outburst of a Legendary General
hk_075.body: A legendary general, feared by all, openly criticizes your management.

choices.A: Put him in his place with a massive flood of souls to manage.
choices.B: Promote him to a more supervised role.
choices.C: Send him to lead a very risky campaign on the surface.

hk_076.title: Infinite Inventories of Sins
hk_076.body: The scribes complain: every day, new sins accumulate faster than the registries.

choices.A: Push them to record everything, even at the cost of chaos.
choices.B: Simplify categories to keep global order.
choices.C: Record in detail only key sins on the surface.

hk_077.title: Pilgrimage of Repentant Damned
hk_077.body: A group of damned attempts an improvised 'pilgrimage' to ask for a reduction in their sentences.

choices.A: Punish them severely and make an example.
choices.B: Create an official ritual of false redemption, highly controlled.
choices.C: Send them back briefly to the surface, marked forever.

hk_078.title: Harmonized Scream Contest
hk_078.body: Torturers are organizing a contest to turn screams into almost musical choirs.

choices.A: Encourage it to attract more curious souls.
choices.B: Place this contest under strict rules.
choices.C: Broadcast these 'songs' into the nightmares of mortals.

hk_079.title: Circle of Broken Pacts
hk_079.body: An entire circle is populated by those who betrayed their pacts, infernal or not.

choices.A: Exploit them to obtain confessions and secrets.
choices.B: Reinforce the structure of their punishments as an example.
choices.C: Send some of them to sow discord on Earth.

hk_080.title: Visit from a Dethroned Ancient King
hk_080.body: An ancient King of Hell, fallen long ago, comes back to see you and comments on your reign.

choices.A: Use him to justify an intensification of damnations.
choices.B: Integrate him as an advisor under heavy surveillance.
choices.C: Send him to inspect areas close to the surface.

hk_081.title: School of Modern Temptations
hk_081.body: A school proposes to train demons specialized in networks, screens, and contemporary addictions.

choices.A: Focus on the volume of harvested souls.
choices.B: Strongly regulate methods to keep control.
choices.C: Prioritize targeting places of power on the surface.

hk_082.title: Competing Circles
hk_082.body: Two circles boast of being 'the most infernal' and fight for resources.

choices.A: Feed both of them with more souls.
choices.B: Impose a clear hierarchy between them.
choices.C: Assign each a different mission on the surface.

hk_083.title: Appearance of a Luminous Rift
hk_083.body: A luminous rift opens at the bottom of a chasm. Some see it as an intrusion from above.

choices.A: Flood it with souls to saturate it.
choices.B: Send disciplined legions to control it.
choices.C: Direct part of the flow towards specific places on Earth.

hk_084.title: Tower of Inverted Meditation
hk_084.body: A tower where the damned do not meditate to find peace, but to ruminate on their faults.

choices.A: Increase the number of souls admitted to this tower.
choices.B: Structure its operation like an infernal monastery.
choices.C: Use these ruminations to guide your temptations on Earth.

hk_085.title: Parade of Infernal Beasts
hk_085.body: Your most monstrous creatures parade in the corridors amidst terrified damned souls.

choices.A: Make it a regular spectacle to break all resistance.
choices.B: Put the parade under a strict security protocol.
choices.C: Send a few beasts to prowl the borders of the surface.

hk_086.title: Night of Inverted Flames
hk_086.body: A strange night where flames burn backwards, from the ground to the sky, destabilizing everyone.

choices.A: Let this phenomenon attract a maximum number of souls.
choices.B: Control and map every affected area.
choices.C: Synchronize this night with certain surface rituals.

hk_087.title: Meeting of Torture Masters
hk_087.body: Torture masters want to be consulted on global strategy.

choices.A: Grant them more souls to manage.
choices.B: Integrate them into a strongly hierarchical council.
choices.C: Entrust them with specific targets on the surface.

hk_088.title: Breach to a Minor Hell
hk_088.body: A breach leads to a small local hell, poorly organized, which crudely imitates you.

choices.A: Steal its souls and absorb it.
choices.B: Restructure it and integrate it into your order.
choices.C: Use it as a pivot base for terrestrial incursions.

hk_089.title: Procession of Broken Masks
hk_089.body: A procession of damned souls wearing cracked masks traverses several circles.

choices.A: Attract even more souls looking for a spectacle.
choices.B: Make this procession a highly codified ritual.
choices.C: Use it as a symbol in certain surface cults.

hk_090.title: Festival of Red Ash
hk_090.body: A rain of red ash falls on your entire kingdom. Some see it as an omen.

choices.A: Proclaim a great soul hunt.
choices.B: Make it a ceremony of order and inverted purification.
choices.C: Associate this festival with specific events on Earth.

hk_091.title: Rebellion of Bridge Overseers
hk_091.body: Those who guard the bridges between circles demand more consideration.

choices.A: Stuff them with new souls to filter.
choices.B: Strictly clarify their rights and duties.
choices.C: Also assign them to monitor passages to the surface.

hk_092.title: Tower of Impossible Oaths
hk_092.body: A tower where the damned are forced to swear what they can never keep.

choices.A: Multiply these oaths to trap more souls.
choices.B: Index each oath in a highly ordered system.
choices.C: Export certain oaths to surface pacts.

hk_093.title: Fields of Ash Statues
hk_093.body: Damned souls frozen into ash statues dot a plain, ready to break or awaken.

choices.A: Shatter them en masse to feed your kingdom.
choices.B: Catalog and monitor them according to strict rules.
choices.C: Send a few to silently haunt the surface.

hk_094.title: Assembly of Flaming Tongues
hk_094.body: Tongues of fire whisper the worst secrets of the living and the dead.

choices.A: Saturate your circles with these revelations to break souls.
choices.B: Classify them as strategic information.
choices.C: Leak some to influential ears on Earth.

hk_095.title: Court of Refined Pacts
hk_095.body: A court specializes in extremely detailed, almost legalistic pacts.

choices.A: Maximize the number of affected souls.
choices.B: Make it a pillar of infernal order.
choices.C: Use these pacts as tools of political sway on the surface.

hk_096.title: Lake of Burning Glass
hk_096.body: A lake of liquefied glass reflects the worst memories of the damned and some demons.

choices.A: Plunge a maximum number of souls into it.
choices.B: Map these reflections to better organize punishments.
choices.C: Show images of the surface in it to influence your decisions.

hk_097.title: Conclave of Demented Laughter
hk_097.body: A group of demons no longer takes anything seriously and turns every torment into a cruel farce.

choices.A: Let them attract souls through the grotesque.
choices.B: Re-establish a strict protocol in their domains.
choices.C: Send them to destabilize certain places on Earth.

hk_098.title: Night of Inverted Mirrors
hk_098.body: Mirrors appear everywhere, showing the damned what they would have done if they had been even worse.

choices.A: Exploit these visions to reinforce pain.
choices.B: Carefully store these mirrors in codified rooms.
choices.C: Project certain reflections into the dreams of mortals.

hk_099.title: Demonic Promotion Process
hk_099.body: Your demons ask for a clear promotion system, with ranks, privileges, and titles.

choices.A: Value those who bring back the most souls.
choices.B: Base promotion on obedience and order.
choices.C: Particularly reward those who act on the surface.

hk_100.title: Great Infernal Census
hk_100.body: You are proposed a complete census of souls, legions, structures, and influences on the surface.

choices.A: Focus the census on the mass of souls.
choices.B: Make it a tool of absolute order and control.
choices.C: Use it mainly to plan campaigns on Earth.

hk_101.title: Bank of the Damned
hk_101.body: An infernal bank offers the damned to 'lend' fragments of their soul in exchange for temporary favors.

choices.A: Encourage these loans to inflate your soul reserves.
choices.B: Regulate severely to avoid chaos.
choices.C: Use these contracts to finance operations on the surface.

hk_102.title: Massive Recruitment Campaign
hk_102.body: Your generals launch a campaign to recruit new legions from among the most violent damned.

choices.A: Accept all volunteers, even unstable ones.
choices.B: Take only the most ferocious and disciplined.
choices.C: Select certain profiles for missions on Earth.

hk_103.title: Black Market of Relics
hk_103.body: Relics stolen from the surface are circulating in an infernal black market.

choices.A: Flood the market to attract more corrupt souls.
choices.B: Confiscate and inventory every relic.
choices.C: Send a few cursed relics back to the surface.

hk_104.title: College of Infernal Strategists
hk_104.body: A college of strategists proposes precise plans for war, corruption, and order.

choices.A: Task them to maximize soul collection.
choices.B: Integrate them into a strict hierarchical chain.
choices.C: Orient part of their plans towards the surface.

hk_105.title: Procession of Forgotten Kings
hk_105.body: Ancient fallen mortal kings parade before your throne, claiming a special status.

choices.A: Display them to attract ambitious souls.
choices.B: Put them back into a rigid punishment protocol.
choices.C: Send some of them to influence their former lands.

hk_106.title: Contest of Innovative Torments
hk_106.body: Your torturers organize a contest to invent new torments adapted to contemporary vices.

choices.A: Reward the most soul-profitable torments.
choices.B: Normalize each technique in an official manual.
choices.C: Reserve the most creative ones for surface elites.

hk_107.title: Latent War Between Two Circles
hk_107.body: Two circles accuse each other of stealing their damned and their guards.

choices.A: Feed them with souls to appease the tension... temporarily.
choices.B: Send an elite legion to restore order.
choices.C: Channel their rivalry towards conquering the surface.

hk_108.title: Rumor of a Gentler Hell
hk_108.body: A rumor runs: somewhere exists a more 'bearable' hell.

choices.A: Let the rumor spread, a source of despair.
choices.B: Identify and crush any organized escape attempt.
choices.C: Use this legend to lure certain mortals.

hk_109.title: Tower of Military Echoes
hk_109.body: A tower echoes the shouts and orders of your legions.

choices.A: Amplify these echoes to galvanize souls.
choices.B: Put the tower under strict military protocol.
choices.C: Use it to coordinate assaults on the surface.

hk_110.title: Salon of Impossible Contracts
hk_110.body: A salon attracts mortals and damned with contracts that no sane being would accept.

choices.A: Sign en masse to rake in souls.
choices.B: Filter agreements to keep a readable order.
choices.C: Reserve certain clauses for the powerful of the surface.

hk_111.title: Mutiny on a Bridge of the Damned
hk_111.body: A bridge connecting two circles is occupied by mutinous damned souls.

choices.A: Drown them under a flood of additional souls.
choices.B: Send a disciplined force to regain control.
choices.C: Transform this bridge into a surface observation post.

hk_112.title: Calendar of Great Abominations
hk_112.body: You are proposed a calendar of 'great abominations' to celebrate every infernal year.

choices.A: Align these dates with damnation peaks.
choices.B: Structure this calendar as the backbone of order.
choices.C: Synchronize certain dates with the surface.

hk_113.title: Chasm of Shifting Shadows
hk_113.body: A chasm vomits shadows that imitate living mortals.

choices.A: Throw souls into it to feed these shadows.
choices.B: Place the chasm under strict military surveillance.
choices.C: Send these shadows to project fear onto the surface.

hk_114.title: Cult of the Silent Flame
hk_114.body: A new cult worships a flame that does not burn but consumes the will.

choices.A: Let the flame devour a maximum of souls.
choices.B: Integrate it into a very structured official ritual.
choices.C: Link this cult to human sects.

hk_115.title: School of Infernal Mentors
hk_115.body: A school trains 'mentors' specialized in the slow perversion of character.

choices.A: Measure their success by the quantity of souls.
choices.B: Evaluate mainly their discipline and obedience.
choices.C: Assign them to key figures on the surface.

hk_116.title: River of Torn Memories
hk_116.body: A river carries the darkest memories of the damned.

choices.A: Throw even more souls into it.
choices.B: Index these memories in archives of order.
choices.C: Use these memories to guide the corruption of the living.

hk_117.title: Miniature Throne Game
hk_117.body: Demons have made a model of your throne and re-enact your decisions in miniature.

choices.A: Encourage this game to reinforce your aura.
choices.B: Impose strict rules: nothing must escape you.
choices.C: Make it a simulation of surface reactions.

hk_118.title: Pillar of Broken Chains
hk_118.body: A pillar of broken chains unites broken pacts and oaths.

choices.A: Attach more souls to it to inspire terror.
choices.B: Organize these chains according to a rigorous register.
choices.C: Use it to weaken certain contracts on Earth.

hk_119.title: Ember Rain on Noble Quarters
hk_119.body: A rain of embers falls only on zones reserved for influential damned souls.

choices.A: Multiply these rains to break their pride.
choices.B: Establish a precise calendar of these punishments.
choices.C: Link these events to certain surface scandals.

hk_120.title: Conclave of Master Illusionists
hk_120.body: Master illusionists demand a more important role in your reign.

choices.A: Let them manipulate mass perceptions.
choices.B: Frame them within a clear hierarchy.
choices.C: Send them to sow doubt in the dreams of the living.

hk_121.title: Refugee Soul Camp
hk_121.body: A shapeless camp of souls presents itself as 'refugees' from other planes.

choices.A: Absorb them en masse into your system.
choices.B: Place them under a strictly codified regime.
choices.C: Use them as currency with the surface.

hk_122.title: Market of Counterfeit Memories
hk_122.body: A market sells memories that are not theirs to damned souls.

choices.A: Take advantage of the confusion to rake in souls.
choices.B: Normalize these exchanges to avoid drift.
choices.C: Export certain false memories to impressionable mortals.

hk_123.title: Eruption of a Volcano of Bones
hk_123.body: A volcano made of bones and skulls wakes up.

choices.A: Feed it with souls to amplify its power.
choices.B: Channel it into an infernal urban plan.
choices.C: Link its anger to certain places on the surface.

hk_124.title: Court of Administrative Torments
hk_124.body: A court specializes in endless bureaucratic torments.

choices.A: Send a massive flow of new souls there.
choices.B: Make it a centerpiece of your internal order.
choices.C: Use this model to inspire a few terrestrial administrations.

hk_125.title: Delegation of Fanatical Devotees
hk_125.body: Souls of religious fanatics want to prove to you that they deserve special treatment.

choices.A: Use them as a showcase to attract other believers.
choices.B: Integrate them into a highly standardized circle.
choices.C: Turn them against the religious structures of the surface.

hk_126.title: Labyrinth of Black Glass
hk_126.body: A labyrinth of black glass reflects the worst possible choices of each soul.

choices.A: Plunge even more souls into this labyrinth.
choices.B: Map the paths to keep total control.
choices.C: Project certain visions to human decision-makers.

hk_127.title: Rumor of a Traitor in Your Ranks
hk_127.body: It is whispered that a high-ranking demon is plotting a coup.

choices.A: Darken the rumor by punishing innocents.
choices.B: Launch a hierarchical and secret investigation.
choices.C: Use the rumor to trigger a targeted purge on the surface.

hk_128.title: Great Lottery of Aborted Resurrections
hk_128.body: Some damned souls hope for a second chance to return alive.

choices.A: Sell false hopes in exchange for souls.
choices.B: Create a highly supervised pseudo-official protocol.
choices.C: Perform a few spectacular returns to frighten mortals.

hk_129.title: Field of Suspended Cages
hk_129.body: Suspended cages contain souls that denounce each other endlessly.

choices.A: Increase the number of cages to get more confessions.
choices.B: Regulate this field to avoid overflow.
choices.C: Exploit these denunciations to manipulate the surface.

hk_130.title: Banquet of Poisoned Illusions
hk_130.body: You are proposed to organize a banquet where everything is an illusion... except the poisons.

choices.A: Invite a maximum number of influential souls.
choices.B: Make it a rare, highly codified ritual.
choices.C: Link it to mortal parties via dreams and hallucinations.

hk_131.title: Misty Bridge to the Surface
hk_131.body: A bridge of mist appears, briefly connecting your kingdom to a specific place in the world of the living.

choices.A: Let souls flood across this bridge.
choices.B: Secure every passage with strict guards.
choices.C: Send a small elite force to explore this place.

hk_132.title: Secondary Throne of Illusions
hk_132.body: A secondary throne allows simulation of different versions of your reign.

choices.A: Test scenarios that maximize souls.
choices.B: Test scenarios that maximize order.
choices.C: Test scenarios centered on the surface.

hk_133.title: Arena of Duels of Pride
hk_133.body: An arena sees souls clash, unable to give up their pride.

choices.A: Stimulate these duels to break more souls.
choices.B: Regulate the arena like a tribunal of pride.
choices.C: Select certain winners for terrestrial missions.

hk_134.title: Cemetery of Unkept Promises
hk_134.body: Each tomb bears the name of a betrayed promise.

choices.A: Bury even more broken souls there.
choices.B: Index each promise for perfect order.
choices.C: Awaken certain promises on the surface.

hk_135.title: Rain of Burnt Feathers
hk_135.body: Charred feathers fall, remnants of creatures from above that were defeated.

choices.A: Make it a sign of victory to attract souls.
choices.B: Store them in inverted sacred archives.
choices.C: Let a few drop on the surface.

hk_136.title: Council of Creaking Judges
hk_136.body: A council of judges demands more authority in verdicts.

choices.A: Measure their efficiency by the mass of souls judged.
choices.B: Place them in a rigid hierarchy under your gaze.
choices.C: Charge them with also judging certain human actions.

hk_137.title: Tower of Inverted Clocks
hk_137.body: Clocks run backwards and alter the perception of time.

choices.A: Plunge more souls into this confusion.
choices.B: Synchronize these clocks with your internal order.
choices.C: Leak this strange time into mortal nights.

hk_138.title: Hall of Royal Masks
hk_138.body: A hall preserves the faces of all your predecessors.

choices.A: Display them to inspire fear and attract souls.
choices.B: Classify them in a strict dynastic protocol.
choices.C: Project these faces into the dreams of certain living kings.

hk_139.title: Fair of Inverted Miracles
hk_139.body: A fair offers 'miracles' that always make the situation worse.

choices.A: Let souls rush to it.
choices.B: Limit the stalls to keep control.
choices.C: Connect this fair to charlatans on the surface.

hk_140.title: Endless Stairs
hk_140.body: An endless staircase forces the damned to climb or descend aimlessly.

choices.A: Increase the flow of souls imprisoned within.
choices.B: Map every landing in your registries.
choices.C: Make human insomniacs feel these steps.

hk_141.title: Suffering Credit
hk_141.body: You are proposed a 'suffering credit' system: suffer more now to 'lighten' later, in theory.

choices.A: Launch this system to recover a maximum of souls.
choices.B: Frame it with rules impossible to satisfy.
choices.C: Sell this idea to certain gurus on the surface.

hk_142.title: Theater of Alternative Lives
hk_142.body: A theater plays what the damned could have become if they had made other choices.

choices.A: Force souls to watch these plays.
choices.B: Organize a complete repertoire classified by type of fault.
choices.C: Project fragments of these plays into the dreams of the living.

hk_143.title: Assembly of Tired Scribes
hk_143.body: The scribes say that even Hell generates too much paperwork.

choices.A: Stuff them with extra souls to manage.
choices.B: Simplify certain protocols to keep order.
choices.C: Delegate part of their load to human bureaucrats.

hk_144.title: Festival of Singing Embers
hk_144.body: Embers sing distorted hymns in the corridors.

choices.A: Let their song attract fascinated souls.
choices.B: Set precise times and places for this festival.
choices.C: Echo these songs in earthly places of worship.

hk_145.title: Greenhouse of Soul-Eating Plants
hk_145.body: A greenhouse cultivates plants that feed directly on fragments of souls.

choices.A: Increase their number to speed up the harvest.
choices.B: Organize this greenhouse as a model institution.
choices.C: Link these plants to certain cursed places on the surface.

hk_146.title: Tournament of Perfect Lies
hk_146.body: A tournament rewards the most destructive lie.

choices.A: Reward mostly the quantity of souls lost.
choices.B: Register every lie in a codified registry.
choices.C: Test these lies on surface networks.

hk_147.title: Crack to a Sea of Acid
hk_147.body: A sea of infernal acid threatens to submerge an entire circle.

choices.A: Throw more souls into it to instill fear.
choices.B: Build dikes with extremely controlled materials.
choices.C: Use this sea as a haunting image for certain mortals.

hk_148.title: Crypt of Unconfessed Secrets
hk_148.body: A crypt contains everything the living and the dead never dared to confess.

choices.A: Plunge souls into it to break them.
choices.B: Index these secrets as strategic data.
choices.C: Let a few leak out into earthly scandals.

hk_149.title: Hall of Competing Thrones
hk_149.body: Several empty thrones seem to await other Kings of Hell.

choices.A: Use them as threats to submit souls.
choices.B: Integrate them into a rigid dynastic protocol.
choices.C: Present them as visions to certain mortal tyrants.

hk_150.title: Great Inventory of Parallel Hells
hk_150.body: You are proposed to census parallel, competing, or embryonic hells.

choices.A: Measure mostly how many souls you can absorb.
choices.B: Make it a tool of order and control over other planes.
choices.C: Use this information to prepare an expansion on the surface.

hk_151.title: Northern Border in Flames
hk_151.body: Rumors speak of an infernal 'North' starting to encroach on your territories.

choices.A: Send legions to test their defenses.
choices.B: Observe from a distance to avoid breaking order.
choices.C: Whisper these rumors up to the surface to sow fear.

hk_152.title: Ambassador from the North
hk_152.body: An emissary from a northern infernal kingdom requests an audience in your name.

choices.A: Receive him with great pomp to attract his souls.
choices.B: Subject him to strict and humiliating etiquette.
choices.C: Propose a secret alliance focused on the surface.

hk_153.title: Offer to Share Damned
hk_153.body: The North proposes a treaty: fairly share certain categories of the damned.

choices.A: Accept to temporarily inflate your stocks.
choices.B: Refuse and reinforce your own registries.
choices.C: Accept officially but divert a portion to the surface.

hk_154.title: Frozen Spies
hk_154.body: Spies inform you that the North is experimenting with unusual icy punishments.

choices.A: Poach their torturers for your legions.
choices.B: Classify these new methods in your manual of torments.
choices.C: Test these horrors on a few souls arriving from the surface.

hk_155.title: Accusation of Usurpation
hk_155.body: A lord of the North accuses you of usurping a forgotten ancient title.

choices.A: Respond with a demonstration of infernal power.
choices.B: Demand a codified infernal trial to settle it.
choices.C: Turn the accusation around by revealing his mortal contacts.

hk_156.title: Breach in the Infernal Glacier
hk_156.body: A glacier of suffering in the North cracks, letting screams escape.

choices.A: Send your legions to recover whatever comes out.
choices.B: Trace an emergency protocol to contain the breach.
choices.C: Open an indirect route to cold regions of the surface.

hk_157.title: Trafficking of Frozen Souls
hk_157.body: You are alerted to a traffic of frozen souls passing through your circles.

choices.A: Take your tithe and turn a blind eye.
choices.B: Regulate the traffic and record every transaction.
choices.C: Let part of the traffic go up to the world of the living.

hk_158.title: Colossus of Living Ice
hk_158.body: A colossus of ice animated by chained souls is heading towards your borders.

choices.A: Destroy it with a shock force.
choices.B: Imprison it in a dedicated circle, under high surveillance.
choices.C: Divert this colossus to frighten a few mortal cities.

hk_159.title: Oath of Non-Aggression
hk_159.body: The North sends you a non-aggression pact inscribed in ice.

choices.A: Sign to concentrate on other sources of souls.
choices.B: Refuse and reinforce your borders.
choices.C: Sign, but use this respite to infiltrate the surface.

hk_160.title: Summons to a Conclave of Hells
hk_160.body: Several infernal kingdoms, including the North, are convening an exceptional conclave.

choices.A: Send an impressive martial delegation.
choices.B: Go only with your sternest administrators.
choices.C: Take advantage of the conclave to forge alliances concerning the surface.

hk_161.title: War of Infernal Songs
hk_161.body: War anthems from the North are competing with those of your own legions.

choices.A: Compose even more terrifying songs.
choices.B: Forbid any song not validated by your order.
choices.C: Echo these anthems in the nightmares of the living.

hk_162.title: Bridge of Black Crystal
hk_162.body: A black crystal bridge briefly connects your kingdom to a fortress in the North.

choices.A: Send your best legions to test their resistance.
choices.B: Strictly control all passage on this bridge.
choices.C: Use this bridge to spy on their contacts on the surface.

hk_163.title: Treaty on Sharing Heresies
hk_163.body: The North proposes to share different heresies and mortal cults.

choices.A: Accept to increase your quick gains in souls.
choices.B: Refuse and codify your own independent cults.
choices.C: Sign to better discreetly infiltrate human religions.

hk_164.title: Skirmish in the Lava Galleries
hk_164.body: A skirmish breaks out in galleries where your troops cross paths with those of the North.

choices.A: Reinforce military presence to impose your law there.
choices.B: Officially delimit passage zones.
choices.C: Install secret portals to the world of the living.

hk_165.title: Coalition of Small Kingdoms
hk_165.body: Small infernal kingdoms turn to you out of fear of the North.

choices.A: Forcibly absorb them into your empire.
choices.B: Create an alliance supervised by a rigorous protocol.
choices.C: Use these kingdoms as pawns on the surface.

hk_166.title: Symposium on Modern Torture
hk_166.body: The North proposes a symposium on new trends in torture.

choices.A: Send your most inventive torturers.
choices.B: Authorize participation only under strict control.
choices.C: Demand that certain techniques be tested first on the surface.

hk_167.title: Sabotage of the Forges
hk_167.body: Strategic infernal forges suffer sabotage attributed to the North.

choices.A: Retaliate with a surprise raid on their arsenals.
choices.B: Launch a major internal investigation into security.
choices.C: Exploit the chaos to camouflage operations towards the surface.

hk_168.title: Trafficking of Blasphemous Banners
hk_168.body: Banners from the North displaying your distorted effigy are circulating in your circles.

choices.A: Let them circulate to stir up hatred... and fear.
choices.B: Confiscate and archive every banner according to strict rules.
choices.C: Send some of these banners to mortal cults.

hk_169.title: Rumor of Icy Treason
hk_169.body: It is whispered that some of your generals admire the discipline of the North.

choices.A: Preemptively purge the suspects.
choices.B: Monitor their actions via a hierarchical chain.
choices.C: Use them as intermediaries to manipulate the surface.

hk_170.title: Monster of Black Ice
hk_170.body: A monster made of black ice has awakened in a shared corridor.

choices.A: Feed it with souls to submit it to your will.
choices.B: Lock it behind a series of seals and registries.
choices.C: Send it to haunt the polar zones of the living world.

hk_171.title: Project for a Common Border
hk_171.body: Your administrators propose to officially codify the border with the North.

choices.A: Draw a border to better concentrate your legions elsewhere.
choices.B: Refuse: no border limits your kingdom.
choices.C: Create a permeable border towards certain points on the surface.

hk_172.title: Exchange of Emblematic Prisoners
hk_172.body: The North suggests an exchange of particularly symbolic prisoners.

choices.A: Accept to recover useful souls.
choices.B: Refuse and establish a strict protocol regarding prisoners.
choices.C: Accept, but release certain captives on the surface.

hk_173.title: Festival of Comparative Tortures
hk_173.body: An official festival compares the tortures of the North and yours.

choices.A: Emphasize brute efficiency in souls.
choices.B: Emphasize rigor and protocol.
choices.C: Export the best ideas to human societies.

hk_174.title: Negotiations on Hero Souls
hk_174.body: The North claims a share of certain particularly rare hero souls.

choices.A: Cede a few souls in exchange for other concessions.
choices.B: Refuse and protect these souls in your internal order.
choices.C: Let them occasionally reincarnate to influence the surface.

hk_175.title: Song of Northern Mists
hk_175.body: A song from the North vibrates the walls of your circles.

choices.A: Amplify it to attract more impressionable souls.
choices.B: Filter it through a ritual to make it predictable.
choices.C: Let this song brush against the dreams of certain mortals.

hk_176.title: Secret Non-Interference Agreement
hk_176.body: An emissary proposes a secret agreement: each stops undermining the other.

choices.A: Accept to stabilize your empire in the short term.
choices.B: Refuse and further consolidate your internal order.
choices.C: Sign, but redirect your intrigues towards the surface.

hk_177.title: Contest of Strategists
hk_177.body: Your strategists want to face those of the North in a contest of influence.

choices.A: Evaluate victory by the quantity of souls gained.
choices.B: Evaluate victory by the stability brought back to the circles.
choices.C: Evaluate victory by the scale of troubles on the surface.

hk_178.title: Exchange of Damnation Manuals
hk_178.body: You are proposed an exchange of manuals describing various methods of damnation.

choices.A: Accept to enrich your techniques.
choices.B: Refuse and reinforce your own standards.
choices.C: Adapt certain chapters for discreet use among the living.

hk_179.title: Ritual of Merging Braziers
hk_179.body: A ritual could temporarily merge certain braziers of the North and yours.

choices.A: Test the ritual to boost the soul harvest.
choices.B: Forbid it as long as it is not perfectly controlled.
choices.C: Direct part of this fusion towards the surface.

hk_180.title: Invitation to a Soul Hunt
hk_180.body: The North invites you to a highly publicized 'soul hunt' in the circles.

choices.A: Participate by unleashing your most voracious legions.
choices.B: Set strict rules to limit the chaos.
choices.C: Extend this hunt to the dreams and hopes of mortals.

hk_181.title: Joint Tribunal
hk_181.body: A tribunal co-chaired by your kingdom and the North is envisaged for certain exceptional cases.

choices.A: Accept to impress souls even more.
choices.B: Refuse and keep a monopoly on judgment.
choices.C: Use this tribunal to condemn symbolic human figures.

hk_182.title: Sharing of Suffering Technologies
hk_182.body: The North proposes to share certain 'technologies' of continuous agony.

choices.A: Adapt them to maximize your soul harvest.
choices.B: Standardize them in your arsenal, in an orderly fashion.
choices.C: Test their effects via strange phenomena on Earth.

hk_183.title: Sabotage of Your Archives
hk_183.body: Your central archives show traces of frost and corruption coming from the North.

choices.A: Respond by burning entire sections of their registries.
choices.B: Rebuild your archives with reinforced rigor.
choices.C: Take advantage of the confusion to erase a few traces on the surface.

hk_184.title: Offer to Merge Pantheons
hk_184.body: The North suggests a partial merger of your mythologies among mortals.

choices.A: Merge to increase the appeal of your cults.
choices.B: Refuse and jealously protect your image.
choices.C: Accept, but orient the merger primarily towards terrestrial sects.

hk_185.title: Poisoned Gift
hk_185.body: The North sends you an artifact supposed to strengthen your legions but with unknown effects.

choices.A: Activate it to immediately reinforce your troops.
choices.B: Place it in a sealed chest, carefully cataloged.
choices.C: Experiment with it on a few human intermediaries.

hk_186.title: Duel Proposed Between Sovereigns
hk_186.body: A ruler of the North proposes a symbolic duel to settle certain differences.

choices.A: Accept and make this duel a grandiose spectacle.
choices.B: Refuse, judging it unworthy of your rank.
choices.C: Accept, but link the effects of the duel to terrestrial catastrophes.

hk_187.title: Soul Smuggling Network
hk_187.body: A clandestine network is smuggling souls from one kingdom to another without authorization.

choices.A: Let it prosper in exchange for a fixed share.
choices.B: Break it and record every culprit.
choices.C: Divert it to feed projects on the surface.

hk_188.title: Appeal to Higher Arbitration
hk_188.body: The North threatens to appeal to an even more ancient entity to settle your conflicts.

choices.A: Accept the risk, sure of your power.
choices.B: Reinforce your order to present an impeccable dossier.
choices.C: Prepare symbolic sacrifices among the living.

hk_189.title: Bloody Diplomatic Incident
hk_189.body: A delegation from the North has been attacked in one of your circles by the damned.

choices.A: Accuse the North of provocation and retaliate.
choices.B: Acknowledge faults and codify better security.
choices.C: Use the incident as a pretext to expand your influence on Earth.

hk_190.title: Conclave of Crossed Flames
hk_190.body: A special conclave brings together your flames and those of the North in the same hall.

choices.A: Seek to completely dominate the assembly.
choices.B: Set strict rules for each intervention.
choices.C: Link certain decisions to strange phenomena on the surface.

hk_191.title: Treaty on Natural Disasters
hk_191.body: The North proposes a treaty to coordinate natural disasters influenced by Hell.

choices.A: Seize the opportunity to harvest more souls.
choices.B: Impose limits to preserve the balance of your circles.
choices.C: Concentrate certain disasters on strategic human locations.

hk_192.title: Unified Hell Experiment
hk_192.body: A bold experiment would consist of briefly merging portions of your circles and those of the North.

choices.A: Accept to create a shock of massive damnation.
choices.B: Refuse, fearing total disorder.
choices.C: Test the unification first through human nightmares.

hk_193.title: Revolt of the Messengers
hk_193.body: Your messengers, exhausted by trips back and forth with the North, demand a special status.

choices.A: Pay them in extra soul fragments.
choices.B: Create a strictly regulated corps of messengers.
choices.C: Partially redirect them to missions on the surface.

hk_194.title: Discordant Accounting
hk_194.body: Your registries and those of the North do not agree on the exact number of shared souls.

choices.A: You impose your figures, by force if necessary.
choices.B: You organize an extremely rigorous infernal audit.
choices.C: You take advantage of the vagueness to make some souls 'disappear' to the surface.

hk_195.title: Proposal for a Grand Common Empire
hk_195.body: Some advisors suggest creating a single empire merging your kingdom and the North.

choices.A: Support the idea to increase general power.
choices.B: Reject it to maintain absolute control of your order.
choices.C: Negotiate behind the scenes to orient this empire primarily towards the surface.

hk_196.title: Revolt of the Archivists
hk_196.body: Your archivists complain about constantly having to adjust your registries according to agreements with the North.

choices.A: Push them to work harder to absorb more souls.
choices.B: Simplify certain agreements to restore clear order.
choices.C: Delegate part of the management to corrupt human institutions.

hk_197.title: Chamber of Eternal Compromises
hk_197.body: A special chamber records every compromise you make with other hells.

choices.A: Multiply compromises to maximize soul flows.
choices.B: Limit these agreements to avoid diluting your authority.
choices.C: Use certain compromises as a pretext for events on Earth.

hk_198.title: Ultimatum from the North
hk_198.body: The North presents you with an ultimatum: cede certain territories or risk open war.

choices.A: Refuse and prepare your legions.
choices.B: Cede secondary zones to buy time.
choices.C: Officially accept, but transfer the stakes to the surface.

hk_199.title: Preparation of a Grand Treaty
hk_199.body: A grand treaty is being prepared to redraw the map of the hells.

choices.A: Seek mainly to increase your share of souls.
choices.B: Seek mainly to guarantee the stability of your order.
choices.C: Insert hidden clauses having effect on the world of the living.

hk_200.title: Signature or Rupture
hk_200.body: Your advisors announce that the treaty with the North is ready to be signed... or rejected.

choices.A: Sign and proclaim the advent of a new infernal age.
choices.B: Refuse and accept a long period of organized tension.
choices.C: Sign while preparing a new era of corruption on the surface.

hk_201.title: Uncontrolled Climate Crisis
hk_201.body: Mortals are triggering serial climate disasters, without really slowing down.

choices.A: Push their destructive behaviors to excess.
choices.B: Encourage a few measures of order to prolong the chaos.
choices.C: Channel certain storms to test new breaking points.

hk_202.title: Spiritual Pollution
hk_202.body: The hearts of mortals are saturated with ecological guilt and simultaneous denial.

choices.A: Stoke their guilt to harvest more souls.
choices.B: Structure a few 'responsible' speeches to maintain apparent order.
choices.C: Let these tensions innervate radical movements on the surface.

hk_203.title: Revolt of Coastal Cities
hk_203.body: Cities threatened by rising waters are demanding miracles.

choices.A: Let the disaster worsen to accelerate damnations.
choices.B: Inspire highly hierarchical but insufficient emergency plans.
choices.C: Use the panic to pave the way for desperate cults.

hk_204.title: Toxic Waste Leak
hk_204.body: A massive leak of waste poisons lands and oceans.

choices.A: Whisper to certain mortals to minimize the incident.
choices.B: Encourage the implementation of standards, too late.
choices.C: Divert the anger towards violent political conflicts.

hk_205.title: Disinformation War
hk_205.body: Mortals accuse each other of lies, to the point of doubting everything.

choices.A: Feed each camp with false revelations.
choices.B: Promote a few 'reasonable' voices to keep a structure.
choices.C: Raise gurus who profit from this fog.

hk_206.title: Social Networks on Fire
hk_206.body: Surface networks turn into arenas of hate and envy.

choices.A: Amplify toxic comparisons and public humiliations.
choices.B: Support rules and moderation that reassure, without acting deeply.
choices.C: Use these platforms to spread new disguised cults.

hk_207.title: Influencers of Despair
hk_207.body: Influential figures glorify fatigue, anger, and nihilism.

choices.A: Boost their audience to harvest more broken souls.
choices.B: Frame their message to avoid a total collapse of order.
choices.C: Push them to guide their followers towards irreversible acts.

hk_208.title: Collapse of a Health System
hk_208.body: A country sees its health system saturated, the weakest are abandoned.

choices.A: Let leaders minimize the crisis to worsen the situation.
choices.B: Inspire a rigid reform, insufficient but structuring.
choices.C: Direct anger towards extremist movements.

hk_209.title: Proliferation of Modern Sects
hk_209.body: New sects promise healing, wealth, and meaning... in exchange for total submission.

choices.A: Encourage their proliferation to harvest souls en masse.
choices.B: Let institutions establish control frameworks.
choices.C: Favor sects particularly connected to your cult.

hk_210.title: Truth Crisis
hk_210.body: Mortals no longer know what to believe, everything is equal and nothing is certain.

choices.A: Push for absolute relativism to better break landmarks.
choices.B: Reinforce a few 'reliable' authorities to maintain a semblance of order.
choices.C: Plant in this fog the idea of salvation reserved for a chosen few.

hk_211.title: War for Resources
hk_211.body: Several regions are fighting over water, food, and energy.

choices.A: Encourage brutal decisions and looting.
choices.B: Support fragile agreements to prolong tension.
choices.C: Raise charismatic leaders ready for anything.

hk_212.title: Proliferation of Autonomous Weapons
hk_212.body: Mortals create weapons capable of killing without human mercy.

choices.A: Push them to delegate ever more decisions to these machines.
choices.B: Encourage complex but circumventable regulations.
choices.C: Let some of these weapons 'mistake' their target.

hk_213.title: Mass Surveillance
hk_213.body: Surveillance systems scrutinize every gesture, every word.

choices.A: Make surveillance accepted in the name of security.
choices.B: Create precise, reassuring, but highly intrusive laws.
choices.C: Use this data to manipulate entire crowds.

hk_214.title: Rush to Artificial Intelligence
hk_214.body: Mortals entrust their choices, their creativity, their attention to systems they do not understand.

choices.A: Encourage them to abandon their discernment.
choices.B: Structure strict rules, often ignored.
choices.C: Orient these systems towards subtle values of domination.

hk_215.title: Loneliness Crisis
hk_215.body: Never have mortals been so connected... and so isolated.

choices.A: Push them to fill the void with destructive excesses.
choices.B: Encourage a few collective structures to keep social order.
choices.C: Create closed, quasi-sectarian communities.

hk_216.title: Urban Riots
hk_216.body: Entire neighborhoods rise up, burn, and withdraw into themselves.

choices.A: Inflame anger to the point of no return.
choices.B: Inspire law enforcement to react according to strict protocols.
choices.C: Raise new violent leaders amidst the chaos.

hk_217.title: Massive Data Leak
hk_217.body: The secrets of millions of mortals are divulged.

choices.A: Exploit this data to push everyone towards their worst temptation.
choices.B: Suggest laws to better regulate these leaks, without really preventing them.
choices.C: Use certain secrets to manipulate human leaders.

hk_218.title: Refused Hospitality
hk_218.body: Crowds displaced by war or climate hit closed borders.

choices.A: Stoke fear of the other and withdrawal.
choices.B: Support strict policies presented as rational.
choices.C: Create violent groups that feed on these tensions.

hk_219.title: Global Financial Crisis
hk_219.body: Markets collapse, wealth evaporates, fear rises.

choices.A: Push mortals to bet everything on immediate gain.
choices.B: Inspire complicated, conditional, and unequal bailout plans.
choices.C: Use this chaos to bind certain powerful people to your pacts.

hk_220.title: Normalization of Corruption
hk_220.body: Corruption becomes an open secret in key institutions.

choices.A: Encourage resignation: 'everyone does it'.
choices.B: Stage a few exemplary, well-controlled trials.
choices.C: Propose infernal contracts behind the scenes to the most compromised.

hk_221.title: Crisis of Trust in Science
hk_221.body: Mortals doubt everything, even the most established knowledge.

choices.A: Encourage the most absurd but seductive theories.
choices.B: Support a few scientific institutions to preserve a semblance of order.
choices.C: Create public figures who mix science, conspiracy, and cult.

hk_222.title: Permanent Spectacle of Violence
hk_222.body: Violence is filmed, relayed, commented on live everywhere.

choices.A: Push mortals to become completely desensitized.
choices.B: Encourage policies of strict image control... never applied everywhere.
choices.C: Use this spectacle to recruit souls fascinated by cruelty.

hk_223.title: Commodification of Everything
hk_223.body: Even intimacy, compassion, and grief become products.

choices.A: Encourage the sale of everything sacred.
choices.B: Let a few laws limit the most visible excesses.
choices.C: Create fake charities that serve your interests.

hk_224.title: Cult of Performance
hk_224.body: Mortals define themselves only by their results, numbers, and exploits.

choices.A: Push this cult to self-destruction.
choices.B: Structure 'well-being' rules integrated into productivity.
choices.C: Use this pressure to make key individuals sign pacts.

hk_225.title: Collapse of Wildlife
hk_225.body: The surface is losing its species, its forests, its ancient balances.

choices.A: Encourage the feeling of inevitability and 'too late'.
choices.B: Support highly regulated but insufficient protection policies.
choices.C: Transform this loss into fuel for extremist movements.

hk_226.title: Exploitation Without Rest
hk_226.body: Night work, fragmented schedules, loss of sleep: mortals no longer rest.

choices.A: Push leaders to demand ever more.
choices.B: Instill regulations on working hours... full of loopholes.
choices.C: Create dependencies that keep everyone awake, at all costs.

hk_227.title: Internal Desertification
hk_227.body: Mortals lose the taste for nuance, arts, and slowness.

choices.A: Push them towards empty and incessant entertainment.
choices.B: Encourage a few highly codified cultural institutions.
choices.C: Raise artistic movements fed by despair.

hk_228.title: Family Crisis
hk_228.body: Family ties tear apart amidst violence, silence, and flight.

choices.A: Feed resentments, unspoken words, brutal breakups.
choices.B: Promote rigid, sometimes suffocating family models.
choices.C: Use these fractures to recruit souls in need of belonging.

hk_229.title: Market of Artificial Memories
hk_229.body: Companies promise to recreate or erase memories.

choices.A: Push mortals to flee reality into these illusions.
choices.B: Regulate these practices with complex laws, easily circumvented.
choices.C: Insert traces of your influence into these memories.

hk_230.title: Extinction of Collective Hope
hk_230.body: A dull wave takes over the surface: no one believes in a better future anymore.

choices.A: Transform this despair into total apathy and solitary vices.
choices.B: Let a few common projects emerge, strictly controlled.
choices.C: Propose, via chosen prophets, a 'salvation' that leads to your arms.

hk_231.title: Drifting Space Colonies
hk_231.body: Orbiting stations and distant colonies gradually escape all Earthly control.

choices.A: Push colonists to break definitely with Earth.
choices.B: Inspire rigid charters to attempt to keep a link of order.
choices.C: Slip cults turned towards you into these isolated communities.

hk_232.title: Race for Extraterrestrial Resources
hk_232.body: Mortals covet asteroids, moons, everything that can be exploited.

choices.A: Stoke the thirst for profit regardless of caution.
choices.B: Encourage complicated but unstable space treaties.
choices.C: Transform these stakes into quasi-religious rivalries between nations.

hk_233.title: Total Metaverse
hk_233.body: Millions of mortals spend their lives in virtual worlds more seductive than reality.

choices.A: Push them to lose themselves until they forget themselves.
choices.B: Impose a few screen time rules to save the illusion of order.
choices.C: Insert secret zones dedicated to your cult into these metaverses.

hk_234.title: Eternal Avatar
hk_234.body: Technology proposes to immortalize mortal consciousness in digital avatars.

choices.A: Encourage this flight from real death.
choices.B: Regulate access to this pseudo-immortality with strict protocols.
choices.C: Slip in flaws that let your influence filter into these avatars.

hk_235.title: Disordered Transhumanism
hk_235.body: Implants, genetic modifications, body optimizations: some mortals redefine themselves.

choices.A: Push for the most extreme modifications.
choices.B: Create legal standards, contradictory and complex.
choices.C: Reserve a few 'improvements' for servants linked to you.

hk_236.title: Unofficial Cloning
hk_236.body: Clandestine laboratories play with human cloning, without any framework.

choices.A: Let these experiments proliferate in secret.
choices.B: Leak certain info to impose spectacular laws.
choices.C: Mark certain clones with a seal only your servants recognize.

hk_237.title: Black Market for Organs
hk_237.body: An underground economy of organs develops on a large scale.

choices.A: Encourage cynicism: everything has a price, even the body.
choices.B: Support highly visible but shallow police operations.
choices.C: Use certain channels to bind surgeons to your pacts.

hk_238.title: Bioengineering Revolution
hk_238.body: Modified plants, animals, and bacteria begin to reshape entire ecosystems.

choices.A: Push mortals to test without waiting for consequences.
choices.B: Impose trial protocols, quickly circumvented.
choices.C: Create special strains that favor your future cults.

hk_239.title: Disaster Tourism
hk_239.body: Mortals pay to visit stricken areas, battlefields, places of drama.

choices.A: Trivialize this tourism until it becomes mass entertainment.
choices.B: Regulate these practices with strict but symbolic moral rules.
choices.C: Attract these visitors to experiences that break their empathy.

hk_240.title: Industry of Memory of the Dead
hk_240.body: Companies manage profiles, videos, messages of the deceased as a monetizable resource.

choices.A: Maximize monetization of the presence of the dead in the lives of the living.
choices.B: Establish a few legal limits on the use of this data.
choices.C: Introduce messages into these archives that orient the living towards you.

hk_241.title: Scapegoat Politics
hk_241.body: Leaders systematically designate groups as responsible for everything.

choices.A: Amplify this strategy to open persecution.
choices.B: Encourage official commissions to give a form of order.
choices.C: Transform these tensions into quasi-religious conflicts.

hk_242.title: Justice as Spectacle
hk_242.body: Trials become primarily media shows, rather than places of truth.

choices.A: Encourage expedited and spectacular judgments.
choices.B: Impose rigid procedural codes, often misused.
choices.C: Use these spectacles to crush your enemies and elevate your pawns.

hk_243.title: Education in Ruins
hk_243.body: Educational systems crumble under inequalities, tensions, fatigue.

choices.A: Push each generation to emerge more disillusioned than the last.
choices.B: Structure complex reforms, changing every five years.
choices.C: Create parallel schools serving your ideology.

hk_244.title: Explosion of Psychotropics
hk_244.body: Between medications, drugs, and substitutes, the surface floats in a chemical fog.

choices.A: Normalize daily usage to avoid any real introspection.
choices.B: Regulate certain products, while letting others prosper.
choices.C: Link certain distribution networks to your servants.

hk_245.title: Colonization of Dreams
hk_245.body: Advertising, screens, and fatigue invade even the sleep of mortals.

choices.A: Definitively blur the boundary between dream and social pressure.
choices.B: Let discourses on 'sacred rest' emerge, little followed.
choices.C: Use these dreams to implant symbols leading to you.

hk_246.title: Market Spiritualities
hk_246.body: A multitude of small spiritualities sell inner peace, success, and serenity in kits.

choices.A: Encourage permanent spiritual zapping.
choices.B: Frame these practices within respectable institutions.
choices.C: Disguise some of your rituals as 'personal development' workshops.

hk_247.title: Sacralization of Celebrity
hk_247.body: Being known becomes more important than everything one truly is.

choices.A: Push mortals to sacrifice everything for a few moments of glory.
choices.B: Create moral codes around 'good' celebrity.
choices.C: Use this thirst to propose quick and dangerous pacts.

hk_248.title: Flight to Tax Havens
hk_248.body: Wealth slips into zones out of reach of most laws.

choices.A: Encourage extreme concentration of fortunes.
choices.B: Support opaque and incomplete international agreements.
choices.C: Forge personal pacts with a few great holders of this wealth.

hk_249.title: Normalization of Psychological Torture
hk_249.body: Harassment at work, online, at school: torture is mostly mental, and tolerated.

choices.A: Make this silent violence a cultural norm.
choices.B: Impose charters and procedures that give an illusion of protection.
choices.C: Transform certain victims into executioners, then servants.

hk_250.title: Refusal to Age
hk_250.body: The surface refuses old age, weakness, dependence: everything must remain young, profitable, smooth.

choices.A: Push mortals to deny their finitude to the end.
choices.B: Promote highly codified 'dignity' policies, often inaccessible.
choices.C: Use this fear to propose life extensions... attached to an eternal price.

hk_251.title: Rain of Feathers
hk_251.body: A rain of golden feathers falls right into your circles. The damned look up: Paradise is manifesting.

choices.A: Profane these feathers by burning them under the screams of souls.
choices.B: Record them as evidence in your archives.
choices.C: Let them float back up to the surface as ambiguous 'miracles'.

hk_252.title: Messenger with Wings Too White
hk_252.body: An angel messenger descends with a parchment: Paradise demands a renegotiation of borders.

choices.A: Tear up the parchment before his eyes and affirm your sovereignty.
choices.B: Accept an extremely rigid discussion protocol.
choices.C: Leak the existence of this angel to a few mortals.

hk_253.title: Contested Souls
hk_253.body: Some dead are claimed by both Paradise and you.
