choices.A: Claim that any ambiguity is settled in your favor.
choices.B: Create an arbitration tribunal with infernally complex rules.
choices.C: Let a few cases get lost in miracles or visions on Earth.

hk_254.title: Parasitic Celestial Songs
hk_254.body: Songs from Paradise can be heard deep in your pits.

choices.A: Drown out these songs with a din of lamentations.
choices.B: Analyze and classify them meticulously in your registries.
choices.C: Let these melodies filter into the dreams of the living, but distorted.

hk_255.title: Petition of Saints
hk_255.body: A group of saints officially demands more compassion for certain damned souls.

choices.A: Laugh openly at their naivety.
choices.B: Open a 're-examination' file as long as eternity.
choices.C: Let the idea of amnesty contaminate a few mortal hearts.

hk_256.title: Non-Interference Agreement
hk_256.body: Paradise proposes a pact: fewer direct temptations, in exchange for fewer spectacular miracles.

choices.A: Refuse and continue the war of total influence.
choices.B: Accept by precisely codifying every exception.
choices.C: Sign officially, while hijacking the game on the surface.

hk_257.title: Overwhelmed Angels
hk_257.body: Guardian angels are complaining above: too many souls are sliding towards you.

choices.A: Multiply opportunities to fall to test their limits.
choices.B: Accept a few 'corridors of grace' to keep global order.
choices.C: Let certain frustrated angels influence mortals in a... less pure way.

hk_258.title: Cracked Bridge of Light
hk_258.body: An ancient bridge of light between Paradise and Hell cracks, exposing unexpected passages.

choices.A: Sabotage the bridge to cut any direct link.
choices.B: Put the bridge under strict administrative control.
choices.C: Let a few cracks open randomly onto the surface.

hk_259.title: Runaway Soul
hk_259.body: A soul promised to Paradise managed to slip into your circles by trickery.

choices.A: Keep it as a trophy, risking a diplomatic incident.
choices.B: Send it back with a detailed report proving your good faith.
choices.C: Send it back only after showing it Hell... and the surface.

hk_260.title: Cancelled Miracle
hk_260.body: A miracle in preparation on Earth is suddenly cancelled by your maneuvers.

choices.A: Boast to the angels about breaking their little show.
choices.B: Record this celestial failure in your archives for later.
choices.C: Let rumors of a 'failed miracle' poison the faith of mortals.

hk_261.title: Messiah Contest
hk_261.body: Several figures present themselves as saviors sent from above... some do not come from Paradise.

choices.A: Multiply false prophets to dilute any true light.
choices.B: Frame their movements with infernal control rules.
choices.C: Leave a few sincere chosen ones, but under strong pressure from darkness.

hk_262.title: Wrath of an Archangel
hk_262.body: An archangel threatens to unleash his wrath on some of your circles.

choices.A: Provoke further and test his limits.
choices.B: Cede a minor symbol to preserve the balance.
choices.C: Divert his wrath towards dramatic events on Earth.

hk_263.title: Negotiations on Purgatory
hk_263.body: Paradise wants to reinforce an intermediate zone to relieve your prisons.

choices.A: Refuse: you return no soul along the way.
choices.B: Accept, but impose strict sorting rules.
choices.C: Use this purgatory to influence the living through visions.

hk_264.title: Desertion of an Angel
hk_264.body: It is whispered that an angel has deserted Paradise, disgusted by certain decisions.

choices.A: Welcome him and make him a symbol of your superiority.
choices.B: Question him methodically and record every detail.
choices.C: Discreetly send this fallen angel to sow trouble on the surface.

hk_265.title: Censorship of Prayers
hk_265.body: Some supplicants receive no answer, neither from above nor from below.

choices.A: Let this silence feed bitterness and doubt.
choices.B: Impose a form of order: certain prayers will always be heard.
choices.C: Answer a few prayers in your own way, pretending to be Heaven.

hk_266.title: Accusation of Interference
hk_266.body: Paradise accuses you of meddling in miracles to pervert them.

choices.A: Fully admit it and dare the angels to intervene.
choices.B: Deny everything and demand a celestial-infernal audit.
choices.C: Continue, but only via earthly 'coincidences'.

hk_267.title: Light Leak
hk_267.body: Light from above infiltrates part of your tunnels.

choices.A: Devour it with your darkness before it spreads.
choices.B: Lock it in a sealed room, carefully cataloged.
choices.C: Let a few reflections reverberate towards the horizon of mortals.

hk_268.title: Dissonant Choir
hk_268.body: The songs of your damned overlap with an angelic choir. The result is... strange.

choices.A: Transform this sonic chaos into a weapon of terror.
choices.B: Attempt to codify these dissonances in your rituals.
choices.C: Send this echo to the ears of certain mortal artists.

hk_269.title: Stubborn Patron Saint
hk_269.body: A saint refuses to let a city fall completely under your influence.

choices.A: Multiply targeted temptations to break his resistance.
choices.B: Bypass this saint by attacking other places.
choices.C: Create scandals around his memory among the living.

hk_270.title: True Relic
hk_270.body: An authentic relic, linked to Paradise, reappears on Earth.

choices.A: Surround it with false miracles to blur its meaning.
choices.B: Discreetly inscribe it in your registries as an object to watch.
choices.C: Push some to kill each other to control it.

hk_271.title: Celestial Procession
hk_271.body: A procession of luminous souls briefly crosses one of your sulfur skies.

choices.A: Attempt to capture a few souls in the passage.
choices.B: Let them pass to avoid a major incident.
choices.C: Project this vision into the dreams of certain unstable mortals.

hk_272.title: Revision of Damnation Rules
hk_272.body: Paradise proposes to review the list of mortal sins.

choices.A: Reject any reform that would limit your harvest.
choices.B: Accept, provided you write the fine print yourself.
choices.C: Rewrite certain sins to better trap modern mortals.

hk_273.title: Unbridled Angel Worship
hk_273.body: On Earth, some mortals idealize angels to the point of making them idols.

choices.A: Encourage idolatry to hijack true spirituality.
choices.B: Let Paradise handle this embarrassing drift.
choices.C: Slip symbols belonging to you into these cults.

hk_274.title: Negotiation on Martyrs
hk_274.body: Paradise wants to recover the souls of martyrs you deem corrupt.

choices.A: Refuse: a fanatical martyr feeds you perfectly.
choices.B: Accept on a case-by-case basis, after detailed investigation.
choices.C: Let them go back up occasionally, but marked by your scars.

hk_275.title: Rain of Local Miracles
hk_275.body: A region experiences a series of small miracles attributed to Paradise.

choices.A: Counter-attack with an avalanche of targeted temptations.
choices.B: Monitor and archive every event without intervening directly.
choices.C: Transform these miracles into a source of jealousy and social chaos.

hk_276.title: Broken Harp
hk_276.body: A celestial harp falls to pieces into one of your lakes of fire.

choices.A: Turn it into an instrument of sonic torture.
choices.B: Keep it intact as proof of a failure of Paradise.
choices.C: Let fragments of it rise back into the world of artists.

hk_277.title: Rumor of Reconciliation
hk_277.body: A noise runs: one day, Paradise and Hell will be reconciled.

choices.A: Ridicule this idea until it disappears.
choices.B: Record it in your archives as a distant hypothesis.
choices.C: Let this rumor feed strange sects on Earth.

hk_278.title: Souls in Transit
hk_278.body: A rare corridor allows souls to briefly glimpse Paradise and Hell before choosing.

choices.A: Disrupt the corridor so it leads more to you.
choices.B: Set strict rules on the use of this passage.
choices.C: Project this choice into the dreams of some people still alive.

hk_279.title: Dispute over Children's Prayers
hk_279.body: Paradise asserts that all children's prayers must go to them.

choices.A: Contest: some children are already your potential creatures.
choices.B: Concede officially... while playing on the adults surrounding them.
choices.C: Transform certain prayers into nightmares that will mark their lives.

hk_280.title: Celestial Library
hk_280.body: A library is discovered above that also records your own deeds.

choices.A: Attempt to sabotage these archives via indirect influence.
choices.B: Compare their data with your registries to adjust order.
choices.C: Let certain mortals pick up snippets of this library in their visions.

hk_281.title: Souls Refusing Both
hk_281.body: A few souls refuse both Paradise and Hell, claiming their own path.

choices.A: Break them until they finally choose.
choices.B: Create a special status of 'unclassified' souls in your order.
choices.C: Let this idea of total refusal inspire some living people.

hk_282.title: Angels Infiltrated on Earth
hk_282.body: Angels descend discreetly to the surface to interfere with your plans.

choices.A: Track them via your servants and corrupt them.
choices.B: Monitor them methodically to adjust your strategies.
choices.C: Let humans mistake them for your own envoys.

hk_283.title: Sign in the Sky
hk_283.body: An apparition visible to entire crowds is interpreted as a sign from Paradise.

choices.A: Immediately provoke a scandal or drama that distracts from its meaning.
choices.B: Let religious institutions tear each other apart over the meaning.
choices.C: Inspire contradictory interpretations leading to division.

hk_284.title: Angel Update
hk_284.body: Paradise 'updates' certain angels to better understand the modern world.

choices.A: Exploit their remaining gaps to trap them.
choices.B: Observe these new methods in detail to adapt your order.
choices.C: Push them to give mortals advice that ends badly.

hk_285.title: Compassion Contest
hk_285.body: A celestial initiative proposes mortals practice radical compassion.

choices.A: Make it an ephemeral fad ridiculed quickly.
choices.B: Let a few communities hold on, to maintain a balance.
choices.C: Divert this compassion towards destructive long-term causes.

hk_286.title: Riot in Paradise
hk_286.body: It is whispered that a quarrel is breaking out even among the blessed.

choices.A: Propagate the rumor everywhere to weaken Heaven's image.
choices.B: Carefully record every detail for a future negotiation.
choices.C: Let certain living people receive visions of this disorder.

hk_287.title: Rescued Souls
hk_287.body: Paradise proposes to 'rescue' a few souls from your deepest pits.

choices.A: Refuse any remission of sentence.
choices.B: Accept a tiny quota in exchange for official concessions.
choices.C: Let cases rise up that will tell horrors to the living.

hk_288.title: Imposed Conciliation
hk_288.body: A superior force demands that Paradise and Hell find common ground on certain subjects.

choices.A: Resist any constraint, even if it provokes a crisis.
choices.B: Accept an extremely bureaucratic conciliation framework.
choices.C: Transpose this conflict into human institutions.

hk_289.title: Conflict over Animals
hk_289.body: The question arises: do animals have a place in Paradise, in Hell, elsewhere?

choices.A: Claim all ferocious and cruel beasts for yourself.
choices.B: Propose a neutral, highly ordered archiving zone.
choices.C: Let the living debate, creating religions centered on animals.

hk_290.title: Lake of Light Amidst Fire
hk_290.body: A lake of pure light suddenly appears in the heart of one of your volcanoes.

choices.A: Attempt to extinguish it with brute force.
choices.B: Delimit it, inventory it, and integrate it into your order.
choices.C: Let reflections of it appear on certain sacred earthly sites.

hk_291.title: Dispute over Artists
hk_291.body: Paradise claims that certain inspired artists should never end up with you.

choices.A: Reply that genius excuses nothing.
choices.B: Set up a special commission for their cases.
choices.C: Inspire a cult of cursed artists on Earth.

hk_292.title: Seal Broken on Earth
hk_292.body: An ancient seal, supposed to protect a sacred place, breaks. Paradise and Hell blame each other.

choices.A: Take immediate advantage of the breach.
choices.B: Propose a joint investigation to fix responsibilities.
choices.C: Transform this place into a focal point of ambiguous apparitions.

hk_293.title: Contradictory Prophecy
hk_293.body: An earthly prophecy announces both the victory of Paradise... and yours.

choices.A: Push mortals to choose the most destructive interpretation.
choices.B: Classify the prophecy among files to watch.
choices.C: Raise rival sects each claiming the 'true' meaning.

hk_294.title: Exchange of Liturgies
hk_294.body: An exchange of studies on liturgies is proposed: prayers from above, rituals from below.

choices.A: Refuse to let your secrets go up.
choices.B: Accept but censor anything that implicates you too much.
choices.C: Transform some of your rituals into popular practices on Earth.

hk_295.title: Aborted Joint Party
hk_295.body: A crazy idea is circulating: organize a symbolic party between Heaven and Hells.

choices.A: Sabotage the project from the start.
choices.B: Demand a protocol so strict that nothing will be spontaneous.
choices.C: Let the idea descend to Earth to inspire an ambiguous celebration.

hk_296.title: Exemplary Soul
hk_296.body: A soul, even after seeing your horrors, continues to love Paradise.

choices.A: Torture it until this attachment is broken.
choices.B: Study it as a textbook case in your administration.
choices.C: Let its story filter through to a few mortals... exaggerating it.

hk_297.title: Canonized King of Hell
hk_297.body: On Earth, a cult begins to present you as a necessary figure of balance.

choices.A: Encourage this cult: being worshipped is always useful.
choices.B: Monitor it so it doesn't disturb your internal order too much.
choices.C: Let it be condemned by religious authorities, increasing its popularity.

hk_298.title: Angel on Punitive Mission
hk_298.body: An angel is sent to punish some of your 'exaggerations' on Earth.

choices.A: Defy him openly with infernal prodigies.
choices.B: Let him strike a few secondary targets to calm Paradise.
choices.C: Push him to go too far, turning mortals against him.

hk_299.title: Vision of an Empty Hell
hk_299.body: Some mortals claim to have seen a vision: a Hell without souls.

choices.A: Turn this vision into ridicule, a simple illusion.
choices.B: Record it as an unlikely variable in your calculations.
choices.C: Let this vision feed movements preaching that 'no one will be damned'.

hk_300.title: Last Impossible Compromise
hk_300.body: A final compromise text between Paradise and Hell is placed on your stone table.

choices.A: Reduce it to ashes and choose eternal confrontation.
choices.B: Sign it, adding a layer of rules to your empire.
choices.C: Sign it... then move the real battlefield to the hearts of mortals.

hk_301.title: Scribe Revolt
hk_301.body: Infernal scribes are complaining: too many souls, not enough time to record everything.

choices.A: Demand they write until their quills break.
choices.B: Reorganize the administration by creating new offices.
choices.C: Automate part of the sorting by delegating it to the surface.

hk_302.title: Demonic Gladiators
hk_302.body: Demons want to create a permanent arena for prestige fights.

choices.A: Let them tear each other apart to entertain the damned.
choices.B: Structure strict rules and elite ranks.
choices.C: Broadcast the spectacle into the dreams of mortals.

hk_303.title: Rumor of Treason
hk_303.body: One of your lieutenants is reportedly building his own faction.

choices.A: Trap him publicly to assert your domination.
choices.B: Place him under close surveillance in a cell of order.
choices.C: Use him as a pawn to infiltrate other circles.

hk_304.title: Torture Reform
hk_304.body: Some demons propose 'psychological' methods rather than physical ones.

choices.A: Encourage these refinements to harvest more broken souls.
choices.B: Codify these methods in a new official manual.
choices.C: Test these techniques first on the living through the surface.

hk_305.title: Union of the Damned
hk_305.body: A group of damned souls demands 'basic rights' in your pits.

choices.A: Crush this movement to remind them what Hell is.
choices.B: Create a very strict pseudo-charter, purely decorative.
choices.C: Let this union inspire a few human revolts.

hk_306.title: Festival of Flames
hk_306.body: Your legions want to organize a festival to celebrate your victories.

choices.A: Authorize a total unleashing of festive violence.
choices.B: Frame the party within a rigorous military protocol.
choices.C: Project visions of the festival into the minds of mortal artists.

hk_307.title: School of Corruption
hk_307.body: It is proposed to open a grand school to train the best corrupters.

choices.A: Accept and recruit the cruelest talents.
choices.B: Integrate this school into the existing administrative order.
choices.C: Send its best graduates to teach on Earth.

hk_308.title: Soul Storm
hk_308.body: A strange storm spins souls around and mixes up the registries.

choices.A: Dive into the chaos to increase your harvest.
choices.B: Suspend all judgment and sort everything by hand.
choices.C: Let the storm blow to the borders of the surface.

hk_309.title: Immortal Chronicler
hk_309.body: A demon proposes to write a complete chronicle of all your reigns.

choices.A: Give him access to everything and let him get lost in the details.
choices.B: Supervise every page to control the official narrative.
choices.C: Drop a few chapters onto Earth in the form of legends.

hk_310.title: Flame Rationing
hk_310.body: The eternal flames seem to be weakening in certain districts.

choices.A: Reallocate flames to the most productive zones.
choices.B: Implement a system of strict quotas.
choices.C: Count on the surface to provide new fuels.

hk_311.title: Black Market of Pain
hk_311.body: A secret trade of exchanging sufferings has developed among the damned.

choices.A: Let it happen: anything that increases global pain suits you.
choices.B: Regulate this market to avoid imbalances.
choices.C: Export this system into the dreams of the living.

hk_312.title: Abyss Architects
hk_312.body: Demonic architects want to remodel certain circles.

choices.A: Give them carte blanche to create unprecedented horrors.
choices.B: Validate detailed plans respecting a strict order.
choices.C: Draw inspiration from human structures to make Hell familiar to new souls.

hk_313.title: Library of Regrets
hk_313.body: You are proposed to gather all the regrets of mortals in a single place.

choices.A: Make it a pit of torment available for browsing at will.
choices.B: Index each regret to refine your future temptations.
choices.C: Let certain mortals feel the echo of this library.

hk_314.title: Tournament of Tempters
hk_314.body: The best tempters compete to prove their superiority.

choices.A: Reward the most cruel and inventive.
choices.B: Formalize a ranking and a promotion order.
choices.C: Give certain winners special missions on Earth.

hk_315.title: Epidemic of Weariness
hk_315.body: Even some demons seem tired of torturing always in the same way.

choices.A: Push them to rediscover pure cruelty.
choices.B: Implement a highly organized task rotation.
choices.C: Let this weariness contaminate the living in the form of existential void.

hk_316.title: Flight into Dreams
hk_316.body: A portion of the damned takes refuge in sorts of lucid dreams to flee the pain.

choices.A: Shatter these refuges with even worse nightmares.
choices.B: Catalog these escapes to control them.
choices.C: Test these escape mechanisms on certain mortals.

hk_317.title: Time Experiments
hk_317.body: Demon scientists want to bend time to repeat the same pain infinitely.

choices.A: Let them experiment on anonymous souls.
choices.B: Frame these experiments to keep a global structure.
choices.C: Apply these time distortions in key human lives.

hk_318.title: Court of Forbidden Pleasures
hk_318.body: An infernal court is created around perverse pleasures reserved for a privileged few.

choices.A: Turn a blind eye as long as it attracts more souls.
choices.B: Integrate this court into the official order, with ranks and titles.
choices.C: Project this logic of privilege into human elites.

hk_319.title: Blasphemy Competition
hk_319.body: A contest is organized to invent the most refined blasphemies.

choices.A: Let dark creativity unleash itself.
choices.B: Keep the most effective ones in an official manual.
choices.C: Leak certain blasphemies into popular culture.

hk_320.title: Deserted Circle
hk_320.body: A formerly very busy circle is strangely less populated.

choices.A: Transfer new souls there to restart activity.
choices.B: Completely remodel this circle for a new concept.
choices.C: Use this desert as an experimentation zone for the surface.

hk_321.title: Allegiance of a Forgotten Kingdom
hk_321.body: An ancient human kingdom, almost erased from history, renews its loyalty to your name.

choices.A: Honor it by resurrecting its symbols in your armies.
choices.B: Carefully archive it for strategic use.
choices.C: Let a few remnants reappear on Earth.

hk_322.title: Silent Forges
hk_322.body: Demonic forges are slowing down due to a lack of new metals and ideas.

choices.A: Force production by recycling everything lying around.
choices.B: Plan a complete refit of the workshops.
choices.C: Import machine ideas by inspiring human inventors.

hk_323.title: Inverted Carnival
hk_323.body: Your demons want to organize a carnival where executioners and victims swap roles.

choices.A: Launch this carnival to break all landmarks.
choices.B: Set limits to avoid a total breakdown of order.
choices.C: Make this concept resonate in human parties.

hk_324.title: Unknown Ritual
hk_324.body: A forgotten ritual reactivates spontaneously in a remote corner of Hell.

choices.A: Let it unfold and observe.
choices.B: Integrate it into your system after dissecting it.
choices.C: Leak fragments of this ritual into human grimoires.

hk_325.title: Lying Contest
hk_325.body: Your agents organize a contest: who will tell the most destructive lie.

choices.A: Reward lies that destroy entire lives.
choices.B: Meticulously note every technique for your archives.
choices.C: Implant these lies into human public speeches.

hk_326.title: Council of Ancient Demons
hk_326.body: The oldest demons demand a special council to give you their opinion.

choices.A: Ignore them and let them ruminate.
choices.B: Listen to them and integrate some of their ideas into your order.
choices.C: Send them to 'advise' human leaders.

hk_327.title: False Memory Workshop
hk_327.body: A workshop proposes to rewrite the memories of the damned to torture them better.

choices.A: Validate the workshop and allow total falsification.
choices.B: Create protocols to classify every manipulated memory.
choices.C: Apply these false memory techniques on the living.

hk_328.title: Mirror Trial
hk_328.body: An obsidian mirror shows souls what they could have been.

choices.A: Force every soul to watch until madness.
choices.B: Reserve the mirror for selected cases, in a precise ritual.
choices.C: Let its image appear in certain human dreams.

hk_329.title: Hunt for Fugitives
hk_329.body: A few souls attempt to hide in forgotten zones of Hell.

choices.A: Launch a merciless hunt.
choices.B: Establish a special police force for leaks.
choices.C: Observe and learn from their strategies to trap the living.

hk_330.title: Ash Cult
hk_330.body: A small cult of damned souls worships your ashes as relics.

choices.A: Encourage them: veneration is always useful.
choices.B: Integrate this cult into the official liturgy.
choices.C: Let this idea spread to a few humans fascinated by destruction.

hk_331.title: Agreement with Nightmares
hk_331.body: The entities that populate nightmares demand more independence.

choices.A: Forcibly submit them to your authority.
choices.B: Negotiate a treaty where their actions remain accounted for.
choices.C: Let them experiment freely in human nights.

hk_332.title: Dark Irony Lessons
hk_332.body: A demon proposes to teach dark irony to the damned so they destroy each other.

choices.A: Authorize these lessons to multiply invisible wounds.
choices.B: Institutionalize these lessons as a mandatory discipline.
choices.C: Send these techniques in the form of 'humor' to the living.

hk_333.title: General's Megalomania
hk_333.body: One of your legion generals already sees himself as king in your place.

choices.A: Break him as an example to all.
choices.B: Promote him to a controlled but prestigious role.
choices.C: Let him lead operations on Earth, far from your throne.

hk_334.title: Collecting Fever
hk_334.body: Some demons collect insignificant objects from mortals.

choices.A: Ridicule this mania and punish it.
choices.B: Organize these collections in an orderly infernal museum.
choices.C: Ensure that humans feel a lack without knowing why.

hk_335.title: Footsteps in the Abyss
hk_335.body: Footsteps are heard in a chasm supposed to be empty.

choices.A: Send armed scouts to explore.
choices.B: Install a permanent guard and surveillance protocols.
choices.C: Let this mystery influence certain human tales.

hk_336.title: Market of Unkept Promises
hk_336.body: A clandestine market trades broken promises between damned souls.

choices.A: Make it an official center of moral torture.
choices.B: Establish a precise registry of every promise.
choices.C: Circulate this concept in human politics.

hk_337.title: Demonic Grimace Contest
hk_337.body: Your demons organize a contest for the most terrifying faces.

choices.A: Encourage creativity to reinforce fear.
choices.B: Standardize the best masks for your legions.
choices.C: Project these figures into the nightmares of human children.

hk_338.title: Lake of Silence
hk_338.body: A lake where no scream can be heard appears in your domains.

choices.A: Throw souls that scream too much into it.
choices.B: Study it and integrate it into a global order plan.
choices.C: Link this lake to certain places of extreme solitude on Earth.

hk_339.title: Invasion of Small Creatures
hk_339.body: Tiny infernal creatures invade the cells of the damned.

choices.A: Let them gnaw everything, including nerves.
choices.B: Train and classify them into specialized units.
choices.C: Send them to infest a few human houses.

hk_340.title: School of Dark Diplomacy
hk_340.body: You are proposed a school dedicated to negotiation, blackmail, and double-speak.

choices.A: Launch the school and recruit the most vicious.
choices.B: Integrate it into your administration for precise missions.
choices.C: Let its graduates weave toxic agreements between mortals.

hk_341.title: Eternity Clocks
hk_341.body: Giant clocks appear, marking not time, but accumulated suffering.

choices.A: Install them everywhere to crush souls.
choices.B: Reserve them for strategic places to keep a terror order.
choices.C: Make their ticking felt in the heads of certain living people.

hk_342.title: Sarcasm Contest
hk_342.body: An entire room echoes with sarcasm that lacerates souls.

choices.A: Encourage this cruel sport.
choices.B: Standardize the best quips for official manuals.
choices.C: Transform this style into trendy humor among humans.

hk_343.title: Overturned Graves
hk_343.body: Some graves on the surface are mysteriously overturning.

choices.A: See it as a sign of your power and amplify it.
choices.B: Census every case and correlate it to your registries.
choices.C: Use these overturnings to trigger local legends.

hk_344.title: Duel of Seers
hk_344.body: Two infernal seers dispute the best way to predict human falls.

choices.A: Push them into a fierce competition.
choices.B: Create an official bureau of predictions.
choices.C: Leak certain prophecies to mortals.

hk_345.title: Chain Bridge
hk_345.body: A chain bridge connects two regions of Hell that were no longer speaking.

choices.A: Use it to intensify soul exchanges.
choices.B: Strictly regulate this passage.
choices.C: Symbolically link this bridge to human alliances.

hk_346.title: Ember Leak
hk_346.body: Embers escape your volcanoes and appear in certain earthly homes.

choices.A: Let these embers stoke domestic violence.
choices.B: Map every appearance point.
choices.C: Transform these embers into recurring symbols of your pacts.

hk_347.title: Lack of New Sins
hk_347.body: Your advisors complain: they feel they have tried everything.

choices.A: Force them to innovate under penalty of punishment.
choices.B: Organize structured workshops of 'evil creativity'.
choices.C: Draw inspiration from the most recent human oddities.

hk_348.title: Laughing Doors
hk_348.body: Some doors of Hell burst out laughing every time a soul passes.

choices.A: Encourage this permanent mockery.
choices.B: Adjust the doors so they laugh at precise moments.
choices.C: Make this laughter heard in very serious places on Earth.

hk_349.title: Mockery of Forgiveness
hk_349.body: A demon proposes to playact forgiveness to torture better afterwards.

choices.A: Authorize this cruel staging.
choices.B: Integrate it into an official 'pardon' procedure.
choices.C: Test this mockery in close human relationships.

hk_350.title: Cracked Crown
hk_350.body: Your own crown shows a slight crack, visible only up close.

choices.A: Ignore the crack and pretend nothing is wrong.
choices.B: Study it with your experts to reinforce your order.
choices.C: Let certain demons and a few humans guess that even you change.

hk_351.title: March of Iron Helmets
hk_351.body: Your heavy legions demand the right to parade every day before your throne.

choices.A: Authorize a permanent parade that crushes the damned.
choices.B: Establish a strict protocol with schedules and routes.
choices.C: Use these parades as visions of terror for certain mortals.

hk_352.title: Statues of Fallen Sovereigns
hk_352.body: An entire gallery groups the statues of human kings fallen into your sphere.

choices.A: Display them to further humiliate their souls.
choices.B: Classify each statue by type of fall in your registries.
choices.C: Let a few statues manifest in dreams to current leaders.

hk_353.title: Wall of Broken Oaths
hk_353.body: An infinite wall bears every oath never kept, carved in black stone.

choices.A: Forcibly paste all new perjuries onto it.
choices.B: Organize oaths by categories in a strict hierarchy.
choices.C: Project this wall into the nightmares of those about to lie.

hk_354.title: Infernal Slogan Contest
hk_354.body: Your advisors propose creating slogans to better sell despair.

choices.A: Validate the most shocking ones and repeat them everywhere.
choices.B: Archive them and methodically test each formula.
choices.C: Seed these slogans in human advertising.

hk_355.title: Ember Bells
hk_355.body: Great ember bells ring with every new damnation.

choices.A: Make them ring until they drive souls mad.
choices.B: Set a precise clock for each ring.
choices.C: Echo these bells in certain sacred human places.

hk_356.title: Illegible Manuscripts
hk_356.body: Manuscripts appear, covered in writing that even your demons struggle to read.

choices.A: Give them to the damned to drive them crazy trying.
choices.B: Create a specialized section to decipher them slowly.
choices.C: Let fragments of these texts infiltrate human literature.

hk_357.title: Tower of Whispers
hk_357.body: A new tower plays back the most shameful confidences of souls on a loop.

choices.A: Imprison the biggest hypocrites there.
choices.B: Classify whispers by theme to optimize tortures.
choices.C: Make certain whispers heard by influential living people.

hk_358.title: Ball of Cracked Masks
hk_358.body: Your demons organize a ball where everyone wears a split mask revealing their true ugliness.

choices.A: Encourage this permanent masquerade.
choices.B: Use these masks to identify and sort your servants.
choices.C: Inspire this ball in worldly human parties.

hk_359.title: Illusion Lab
hk_359.body: A lab experiments with illusions capable of replacing reality for the damned.

choices.A: Plunge certain souls into a fake perfect life before breaking everything.
choices.B: Catalog each illusion as a tool of order.
choices.C: Test these illusions in the dreams of key people on Earth.

hk_360.title: Game of Ember Chairs
hk_360.body: Your jailers invent a cruel game where the damned fight over burning seats.

choices.A: Encourage this competition without rules.
choices.B: Implement precise regulations to make it a ritual.
choices.C: Import this concept into human office life.

hk_361.title: Abyss Cartographers
hk_361.body: Demonic cartographers want to draw the complete map of your chasms.

choices.A: Let them get lost, as long as souls suffer.
choices.B: Control every map to structure Hell even further.
choices.C: Let a few fragments of these maps reach human hands.

hk_362.title: Innovative Torture Tournament
hk_362.body: A contest rewards the most original torture methods.

choices.A: Give winners total power over entire districts.
choices.B: Standardize the best tortures in your official manual.
choices.C: Inspire more discreet cruelties among humans.

hk_363.title: River of Forgotten Names
hk_363.body: A river carries away the names of those no one remembers anymore.

choices.A: Throw souls who refuse to admit their insignificance into it.
choices.B: List every name in a registry before it disappears.
choices.C: Let this river flow into the dreams of those afraid of oblivion.

hk_364.title: Mocking Judges
hk_364.body: A college of demonic judges starts laughing at every plea from souls.

choices.A: Encourage them to ridicule any defense attempt.
choices.B: Pace their mockery to keep a semblance of procedure.
choices.C: Instill this style in certain human courts.

hk_365.title: Cemetery of Thrones
hk_365.body: A cemetery groups all the broken thrones of powerful people fallen to you.

choices.A: Organize forced visits for new damned sovereigns.
choices.B: Classify each throne by regime type for your internal order.
choices.C: Make visions of this cemetery appear to current leaders.

hk_366.title: Children of Wrath
hk_366.body: A group of child souls develops a cold and intelligent rage.

choices.A: Use them as unpredictable weapons against other damned.
choices.B: Study them to understand this anger and order it.
choices.C: Let their hatred spill over into the dreams of human families.

hk_367.title: Whispering Blades
hk_367.body: Your torturers' weapons begin to whisper to the ears of souls.

choices.A: Let them breathe despair and paranoia.
choices.B: Draft a protocol for these conscious weapons.
choices.C: Project these whispers into the thoughts of certain human criminals.

hk_368.title: Hall of Cancelled Decisions
hk_368.body: A hall shows every major human decision that could have changed direction.

choices.A: Force souls to eternally relive their missed choices.
choices.B: Index these decisions to refine your future manipulations.
choices.C: Let a few visions of this hall haunt leaders still alive.

hk_369.title: Fair of Failed Miracles
hk_369.body: A fair exposes all the nearly accomplished miracles that failed.

choices.A: Make it a constant spectacle to humiliate the faith of souls.
choices.B: Classify each failure by type of interference.
choices.C: Slip the idea of these failed miracles into human sermons.

hk_370.title: Choir of Last Words
hk_370.body: A choir repeats the last words of millions of mortals on a loop.

choices.A: Add a distorted echo to it that crushes hope.
choices.B: Note the most useful phrases for your archives.
choices.C: Make this choir heard in the silence of certain hospital rooms.

hk_371.title: Demon Tailors
hk_371.body: Demons want to weave cloaks with the illusions of mortals.

choices.A: Let them make outfits that crush souls.
choices.B: Organize these workshops into well-hierarchized guilds.
choices.C: Send some of these motifs into human fashion.

hk_372.title: Hall of Forced Confessions
hk_372.body: A hall pushes souls to confess everything, even the unconfessable.

choices.A: Throw the proudest there until they crack.
choices.B: Record every confession in a meticulous file.
choices.C: Resonate these confessions in the minds of certain fragile living people.

hk_373.title: Dust Festival
hk_373.body: A festival is proposed to celebrate everything that ends in dust with you.

choices.A: Encourage this celebration of erasure.
choices.B: Structure it as an official calendar of Hell.
choices.C: Let this theme inspire desperate human works.

hk_374.title: Masks of Respectability
hk_374.body: Masks give the damned the appearance of honorable people.

choices.A: Force them to wear them knowing what they hide.
choices.B: Distribute these masks according to a very precise order.
choices.C: Birth this same social mask among human elites.

hk_375.title: Clock of Betrayals
hk_375.body: A clock strikes with every betrayal committed on Earth.

choices.A: Amplify the noise so the damned hear nothing else.
choices.B: Link each ring to a file in your administration.
choices.C: Make human traitors feel unease at every bell toll.

hk_376.title: Labyrinth of Files
hk_376.body: A labyrinth of filing cabinets contains the complete lives of billions of mortals.

choices.A: Abandon certain souls there until they get lost.
choices.B: Appoint a supreme archivist to organize everything.
choices.C: Let fragments of files manifest in human investigations.

hk_377.title: Revolt of Chains
hk_377.body: The chains themselves seem to want to decide whom to hold.

choices.A: Break them to remind them who commands.
choices.B: Negotiate a form of order with these conscious chains.
choices.C: Symbolically link these chains to certain human addictions.

hk_378.title: Great Abyss Games
hk_378.body: Your lieutenants want to organize giant games to separate the damned.

choices.A: Let the strong devour the weak.
choices.B: Establish rules, teams, and rankings.
choices.C: Provoke copies of these games in human spectacle society.

hk_379.title: School of Toxic Nostalgia
hk_379.body: A school teaches souls to regret an idealized past that never existed.

choices.A: Make it a central discipline of torture.
choices.B: Evaluate nostalgia levels and record them.
choices.C: Instill this poison into human political discourse.

hk_380.title: Port of Red Mists
hk_380.body: A port where red mists constantly bring new souls is developing.

choices.A: Let the mist ships dock without control.
choices.B: Establish flow control according to your priorities.
choices.C: Symbolically link this port to certain coastal places on Earth.

hk_381.title: Infernal Theater Troupe
hk_381.body: A troupe plays distorted life scenes on a loop for the damned.

choices.A: Encourage the cruelest and most humiliating versions.
choices.B: Structure the plays into well-organized cycles.
choices.C: Spill this theater into the dreams of human artists.

hk_382.title: Forced Allegiance Oaths
hk_382.body: Your scribes propose making every soul swear on your name.

choices.A: Impose this oath on everyone, under threat.
choices.B: Record every oath in an official registry.
choices.C: Echo this type of oath in certain earthly sects.

hk_383.title: Shards of Broken Paradise
hk_383.body: Luminous shards fallen from a higher place are found.

choices.A: Trample and mock them.
choices.B: Store them in a closed, well-labeled display case.
choices.C: Make these shards glint in sacred human places.

hk_384.title: Patrol of Overseers
hk_384.body: Your overseers want extended powers to control every nook.

choices.A: Let them impose total terror.
choices.B: Organize them in a strict hierarchy with regular reports.
choices.C: Project this surveillance model into human cities.

hk_385.title: Merchants of Adulterated Comfort
hk_385.body: Demons sell fake comforts to the damned in exchange for more suffering later.

choices.A: Turn a blind eye as long as it breaks souls further.
choices.B: Tax and regulate this trade within your order.
choices.C: Export this model to certain human markets.

hk_386.title: Reversible River
hk_386.body: A river of souls sometimes seems to flow up, sometimes down.

choices.A: Let it be capricious to confuse the damned.
choices.B: Study this phenomenon and integrate it into your plans.
choices.C: Link this river to human stories of second chances.

hk_387.title: School of Self-Deception
hk_387.body: A school teaches souls to lie to themselves over and over.

choices.A: Make it a central base of psychological torture.
choices.B: Classify types of lies for your archives.
choices.C: Make these techniques a norm in human societies.

hk_388.title: Garden of Frozen Ashes
hk_388.body: A garden where every flower is an ash of definitively extinguished hope.

choices.A: Walk optimistic souls there until they give up.
choices.B: Catalog each flower by origin of broken hope.
choices.C: Let this garden appear in the visions of human mystics.

hk_389.title: Spectacle of Repeated Falls
hk_389.body: A show replays the fall of certain souls on a loop.

choices.A: Invite those who still believe they are innocent.
choices.B: Synchronize these scenes with your order calendar.
choices.C: Project these falls as symbols in human media.

hk_390.title: Pact Forges
hk_390.body: Special forges create pacts carved in metal.

choices.A: Reinforce every desperate engagement this way.
choices.B: Number and classify each signed pact.
choices.C: Link these pacts to the most abusive human contracts.

hk_391.title: Awakening of Pain Statues
hk_391.body: Statues made of frozen pain begin to move slightly.

choices.A: Use them as terrifying guardians.
choices.B: Study them to understand the evolution of suffering.
choices.C: Let their silhouette appear in certain human nightmares.

hk_392.title: Hall of Contagious Regrets
hk_392.body: In this hall, a single regret triggers a thousand others.

choices.A: Lock the indecisive there to break them.
choices.B: Measure the propagation of regrets for your order.
choices.C: Birth this mechanism in human perfectionists.

hk_393.title: Accountant Demons
hk_393.body: Demons count every tear, every scream, every sigh.

choices.A: Push them to inhuman efficiency.
choices.B: Integrate their balance sheets into your global strategy.
choices.C: Inoculate this obsession with numbers into certain human economies.

hk_394.title: Flameless Pyres
hk_394.body: Pyres that do not burn the body, but something else.

choices.A: Tie those who cling to their image there.
choices.B: Classify each invisible burn as order data.
choices.C: Echo these pyres in human social shame.

hk_395.title: Suspension Bridge over Void
hk_395.body: A fragile rope bridge connects two cliffs of screaming souls.

choices.A: Force the damned to cross it again and again.
choices.B: Establish crossing rules to control fear.
choices.C: Use this bridge as a symbol in human crisis visions.

hk_396.title: Library of Excuses
hk_396.body: A library stores every excuse spoken to avoid taking responsibility.

choices.A: Make those who spoke them read them.
choices.B: Classify excuses by efficiency for your future temptations.
choices.C: Let certain excuses become stock phrases on Earth.

hk_397.title: Soot Meteors
hk_397.body: Meteors of soot fall regularly into your pits.

choices.A: Let them crush souls at random.
choices.B: Plan their falls to remodel certain sectors.
choices.C: Link these dark rains to natural events on Earth.

hk_398.title: Horn of Summons
hk_398.body: A giant horn can gather all your forces in an instant.

choices.A: Sound it often to assert your presence.
choices.B: Reserve it for the most critical moments.
choices.C: Make this sound felt as a diffuse anxiety in certain mortals.

hk_399.title: Secondary Throne
hk_399.body: Your advisors suggest creating a second throne to delegate.

choices.A: Refuse to share even a shred of your power.
choices.B: Appoint a temporary, highly supervised regent.
choices.C: Give this symbolic throne to a figure who will influence mortals.

hk_400.title: Review of an Infernal Reign
hk_400.body: Your scribes place the complete balance sheets of your current reign before you.

choices.A: Ignore the numbers and continue in excess.
choices.B: Study every piece of data to optimize your order.
choices.C: Decide to orient your efforts more towards the surface.
